title: Assistant Sales Manager|$7/hr|NO WEEKENDS
description:
Join a growing U.S. company and help lead high-performing sales teams from home.



Come grow with us at BlueYonder Corp!



We are looking for a Sales Management Assistant who is highly organized, experienced with sales operations, and comfortable supporting a remote team. If you enjoy working with data, improving team performance, and supporting sales teams, this could be the perfect opportunity for you.



Why Join BlueYonder Corp?



We offer stability, growth, and a supportive remote work environment.



Work Hours and Schedule: 9am - 5:30pm EST Monday – Friday

Paid Vacation Days

Many of our tea
mbers stay with us long-term, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company.



Your Role



You will help support our sales management team and ensure our remote sales team is operating efficiently.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Monitoring sales team performance

• Supporting onboarding and training of sales representatives

• Working with Excel to track performance data

• Maintaining and organizing reports

• Communicating with CRM vendors when needed

• Supporting the sales team with CRM and Zoom



Excel Skills Needed

VLOOKUP

IF statements

Pivot Tables

Basic calculations

Cleaning and organizing data



Requirements



Experience working remotely

Experience using CRM systems (Zoho preferred but not required)

Excellent English communication skills

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Experience working with U.S. companies is a plus.



WHO is BlueYonder Corp?



We have an established and unique credit card processing program. Since 2016 we operate in all 50 states.

We offer businesses a credit card processing program that costs them a flat rate of $65 dollars a month for unlimited processing. Business owners love our program because they save tens of thousands a year in fees. Which they would otherwise have to pay.

If you are unfamiliar with merchant processing, business owners are charged high fees on each card transaction. And the fees are going up. BlueYonder’s proprietary system and technology eliminates those fees.

About yourself

title: Meta Ads Media Buyer – Health & Beauty / Supplements
description:
Location: Remote (CET timezone availability required)

Type: Contract / Full-time | Fixed Fee + Profit Share



Who We Are

We are a fast-growing e-commerce team operating in the health, beauty, and supplements dropshipping space. One year in, we are profitable, structured, and now scaling hard. This is not just a job. This is an opportunity to grow alongside a driven team, share in the results you produce, and build something significant together. We don't buy your time. We invest in your contribution.



The Role

We are looking for an experienced Meta Ads Media Buyer who knows the health and beauty niche inside out. You will own our paid media operations on Meta, from campaign structure to creative strategy to scaling winning ads. You will be hands-on, data-driven, and available during CET business hours with strong responsiveness throughout the day.



What You Will Do



Manage and optimize Meta Ads campaigns across our supplement and health/beauty product catalog

Analyze performance data daily and make confident, fast decisions

Develop and test new creative angles, identifying what moves the needle

Brief video editors with clear, actionable creative direction based on data and market insight

Add new ad creatives to winning campaigns without disrupting performance

Test new products through structured, methodical paid traffic strategies

Understand and work within a funnel-based dropshipping framework (Shopify + Meta)

Track everything. Report clearly. Iterate fast.





What We Are Looking For



Proven experience running Meta Ads in the health, beauty, or supplement niche (dropshipping experience is a strong plus)

Familiarity with Andrew Meda's Meta Ads methodology and frameworks

Strong understanding of creative strategy: angle analysis, hook testing, ad fatigue management

Comfortable working in CET timezone and being consistently reachable during campaign hours

A structured thinker who can manage multiple campaigns and priorities simultaneously

Someone who takes ownership, not just instructions





Compensation



Fixed monthly fee (details shared directly)

Performance-based profit share for top results

The better you perform, the more you earn. Simple.

title: Video editor for Weddings
description:
Wedding Video Editor



We are a wedding and event company that provides photography, videography, DJ, and photo booth services. We are looking for a Wedding Video Editor to help us edit wedding films in a style that matches our brand.



This is a freelance, project-based role. It is not full-time and not a regular part-time schedule. Work will be assigned based on the number of weddings we film each year.



We expect to have around 30 wedding video projects per year, with most projects happening between May and October.



About the Role:

We are looking for someone who has experience editing wedding videos and understands how to create an emotional, polished, professional final film.



You should be creative, but also able to follow our editing style and instructions. We have an SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) that explains how we want our wedding videos edited. You must be willing to follow that process closely and make edits that fit our style.



Responsibilities

Edit wedding videos using footage provided by Studio Veil

Follow our SOP and editing instructions carefully

Match the brand editing style and quality standards

Organize footage and complete edits in a clean, professional way

Add music, audio, color correction, and pacing appropriate for wedding films

Deliver completed videos by the required deadline

Complete revision requests when needed

Communicate clearly about progress, questions, and delivery



Requirements

Experience editing wedding videos

Fluent in English, especially written English

Able to follow detailed instructions and an established editing workflow

Creative editor with a good sense of storytelling, pacing, music, and emotion

Willing to edit to our style

Reliable and able to meet deadlines

Good communication and responsiveness

Able to handle revision requests professionally and quickly



Turnaround Time

We require a 2-week turnaround time starting from when the files are delivered to you.

If revisions are requested, they must be completed within 3 business days.

Please only apply if you are confident you can meet these deadlines consistently.



Work Schedule

This role is project-based.

Work is not guaranteed every week

Hours will vary depending on the season and the number of weddings filmed.

Estimated volume is about 30 videos per year.

This position is best for someone looking for freelance work with flexible scheduling, as long as deadlines are met.



Ideal Candidate

The ideal person for this role is:

Experienced in wedding editing

Strong in English communication

Creative, but also coachable

Comfortable following a clear editing system

Reliable with deadlines

Detail-oriented and consistent



How to Apply

Please send:

Your resume or work history

A short introduction about yourself

Examples of wedding videos you have edited

What editing software you use

Your typical editing turnaround time

Your rate or pricing structure

A short note confirming that you are comfortable following an SOP and editing to a required style

title: Graphic Designer + Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We are Keenya Kelly LLC, a fast-moving social media education and strategy brand based in Houston, Texas. We teach entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and monetize through content. Our founder, Keenya Kelly, is a TikTok and Instagram Growth Strategist with a business built over 10 years.



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative full-time tea
mber who can handle both graphic design and social media management tasks. This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.



What You Will Do

Graphic Design (approx. 50% of role):

Create social media graphics, banners, thumbnails, and branded templates in Canva

Design promotional materials for launches, webinars, and digital products

Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets

Resize and reformat existing designs for multiple platforms



Social Media Management (approx. 50% of role):

Write or lightly edit captions in our brand voice

Monitor comments and engage with the community

Track basic performance metrics and report weekly

Support content calendar execution during launches



What We Are Looking For

Highly responsive to
 and messages — we are a fast-moving team

Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines without being chased

Previous experience working with a personal brand or online business is a plus



Schedule and Compensation

Pay rate: $6.00 USD per hour via OnlineJobs.ph

Schedule: US Central Time business hours preferred

Start: Immediate



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following short sample task along with your application. Applications without the completed task will not be reviewed.



SAMPLE TASK

Create ONE social media graphic (1080x1080) in Canva for a fictional post promoting a our course

/keenyakelly

Write 2 caption options for the graphic above as if posting to Instagram. Each caption should include a hook, 2–3 sentences of value, a call to action, and 3–5 relevant hashtags.



Task 3 — Portfolio

Share a link to your portfolio OR attach 3–5 samples of past graphic design work. If you have managed social media accounts before, please also share the handle or a screenshot showing results.



A Note on Communication

This team moves quickly. We expect our tea
mbers to check
 and messages daily, respond within 24 hours, and complete agreed-upon tasks on time. If you are someone who values clear communication and takes ownership of your work, we would love to hear from you.



We look forward to reviewing your application

title: Freight Broker Agent (Remote – Commission-Based)
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic freight brokerage specializing in a wide range of transportation solutions—including dry vans, reefers, flatbeds, drayage and more. Our dedicated carrier sales team provides robust backend support to empower our freight agents and ensure seamless logistics operations. We’re committed to delivering exceptional value to clients through innovative freight solutions and operational excellence.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced and motivated Freight Broker Agent to join our team in a remote, independent capacity. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced logistics environment, manages their own book of business, and is hungry to grow with the support of a carrier sales team that’s got your back.



Key Responsibilities

Freight Coordination: Match shippers with appropriate carriers across dry van, reefer, flatbed, and specialty lanes

Client Success: Deliver exceptional service, resolve issues promptly, and build long-term client relationships

Dispatching: Oversee shipment execution from pickup to delivery, ensuring on-time performance

Account Management: Own your accounts with care, insight, and attention to service excellence

New Business Development: Prospect and engage new shippers, building your personal revenue pipeline

Team Collaboration: Partner with our in-house carrier sales reps to ensure smooth, supported operations

Issue Resolution: Troubleshoot freight challenges in real-time with urgency and accuracy

Tracking & Reporting: Maintain organized load records and communicate updates to leadership as needed



Minimum Qualifications

1+ years of experience in freight brokerage or 3PL logistics

Strong understanding of U.S. freight markets and carrier negotiation

Proficiency with TMS platforms and load boards (e.g., DAT, Truckstop)

Excellent communication and client-facing skills

Self-motivated and organized, with the ability to work independently



Preferred Qualifications

2+ years of experience in a freight agent or commission-based logistics role

An active book of business with existing shipper relationships

Experience in cold prospecting and B2B freight sales

Familiarity with dry van, reefer, and flatbed modes

Prior remote work experience or proven success in independent roles

Knowledge of FMCSA compliance and industry regulations



Perks & Benefits

title: Competitor Research Specialist
description:
WE'RE HIRING — Competitor Research Specialist

E-Commerce / Dropshipping | Remote | 2-Week Contract | Market-Rate Pay



About Us

We run fast-growing e-commerce brands built on Shopify, selling to customers across the US. We operate in competitive niches and move fast. To stay ahead, we need someone who knows how to extract signal from noise — someone who can monitor the competitive landscape across
 and 
, track winning products and ads, and deliver a sharp weekly report that gives us an edge.

Right now, competitor monitoring is done ad hoc by the founders. We need a senior-level specialist who can own this function end-to-end and turn it into a consistent, structured intelligence feed we can act on.



The Role

Your job is intelligence gathering — not strategy. You monitor competitors, track winning ads and products, and deliver a structured weekly summary. What we do with that information is our decision. Your job is to make sure we never miss what is happening in our market.

What you'll do day-to-day



Monitor competitor
 and 
 ads daily using Minea, AdSpy, PiPiAds, and the
 Ad Library

Track which products competitors are actively pushing — new launches, bestsellers, and products gaining traction

Monitor competitor Shopify stores: pricing changes, new product additions, and promotional activity

Identify winning ad creatives: what formats, hooks, and angles are performing across the market

Track how long competitor ads have been running — longevity signals profitability

Deliver a structured weekly intelligence report covering: top ads spotted, new products, pricing shifts, and notable creative trends

Flag urgent findings immediately — a competitor launching a direct attack on one of our niches should not wait for the weekly report

Maintain a running log of tracked competitors, products, and ad accounts

Build and refine a competitor tracking system we can scale with over time





Who We're Looking For

This is a senior role. We need someone who has spent serious time inside ad spy tools, knows how to read competitive signals quickly, and can structure raw data into a clean, actionable weekly report. You have seen enough winning ads and dropshipping stores to know what matters and what is noise.

Must-haves



At least 2 years of hands-on experience with ad spy and competitor research in e-commerce or dropshipping

Deep working knowledge of Minea, AdSpy, or PiPiAds — you know how to filter, sort, and extract what matters fast

Expert-level familiarity with the
 Ad Library — you know how to use it beyond the basics

Proven ability to identify winning products and ads before they are saturated

Strong understanding of the US dropshipping market: what sells, what pricing looks like, and what ad angles work

Ability to structure raw research into a clean, consistent weekly report — no walls of text, no fluff

Self-directed and reliable: you deliver every week without being chased

Senior-level pattern recognition — you know a winning ad when you see one and can explain why



Nice-to-haves



Experience monitoring TikTok ads using PiPiAds or similar TikTok-specific spy tools

Familiarity with reading Shopify store signals (app installs, theme choices, trust badge patterns)

Experience building competitor tracking dashboards or structured logging systems

Background in a high-volume dropshipping operation where speed of intel directly influenced decisions





What a Great Weekly Report Looks Like

We are not looking for a data dump. Every weekly report should cover:



Top 3-5 ads spotted this week worth paying attention to — with screenshots and a brief note on why

New products gaining traction across competitor stores — with source, price point, and ad angle observed

Any pricing or promotional shifts from direct competitors

One broader market observation — a trend, a format, or a pattern worth noting



Clean. Structured. Scannable in under 10 minutes. That is the standard.



Compensation

This is a 2-week contract with a fixed end date — we need someone who can hit the ground running from day one and deliver immediately. Pay is market-rate and based on experience, agreed upon before the start. There is potential to extend based on the quality of work delivered.

What We Offer



Full ownership of the competitor intelligence function — your system, your format, your standards

Direct access to the founders — your findings go straight to the people who act on them

Bring tools or tracking methods we don't use and we'll consider implementing them

Potential to extend or transition into a permanent role based on performance

Quarterly rate review for specialists who deliver consistently





How The 2 Weeks Are Structured

This is a 2-week contract — there is no ramp-up time. Here is how the two weeks are structured:



Week 1: Full briefing on our brands, niches, and current competitors. Access to all tools. First weekly report delivered by end of week — no trial period, we need output immediately.

Week 2: Full independent ownership. Second weekly report delivered. Handover document prepared at end of week — covering tracked competitors, tools setup, and any ongoing signals worth monitoring.

End of contract: We review both reports together, evaluate quality and coverage, and d
 whether to extend.





How to Apply

We filter carefully. Generic applications will not be considered. We need to see that you actually know how to use these tools, that you understand what makes a winning ad, and that you can structure your findings clearly.



Send us a  whatsapp  on 
with a document named :

"Competitor Research Application – [Your Name] – comp research"

Your message must include the following — no more, no less:



A short paragraph (5-8 sentences) on your most relevant competitor research and ad spy experience

One real example of a winning product or ad you identified through spy tools — what tool you used, what signal told you it was winning, and how long it had been running

A sample of what your weekly report output looks like — attach a real or mock example (PDF or screenshot)

The spy tools you use daily and which one you consider your strongest

Your availability and preferred rate structure



Applications that don't follow this format will not receive a reply. We respect your time and ask you to respect ours.

title: Video Editor
description:
Brand: Blunt Cases

About Us



Blunt Cases is a confidence-driven phone case brand based in the US. We create bold, empowering designs that feel like you. 



We’re performance-first. Our ads need to stop the scroll, drive clicks, and convert.



The Role



We’re looking for a Performance Video Editor who knows how to make ads that SELL — not just look pretty.



You’ll take UGC, product clips, hooks, trends, and raw assets and turn them into high-converting TikTok, Instagram, and Meta ad creatives.

This is fast, punchy, scroll-stopping, conversion-focused content.

A potential client

A referral partner

Update conversation notes and contact information

Requirements

Reliable and consistent

Comfortable following structured processes

Able to work independently

Interested in long-term work

Experience with GoHighLevel or CRM systems is a plus.

Work Details

description:
JOB TITLE



Outsourced CFO / Controller



JOB TYPE



Full-Time or Part-Time

Remote



JOB SUMMARY



Remote Imaging Consultants is looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable CFO / Controller to oversee and strengthen our financial operations. This role is responsible for managing accounting processes, financial reporting, budgeting, cash flow monitoring, compliance, and supporting leadership with financial insights for decision-making.



We are open to both CPA and non-CPA candidates, as long as the applicant has strong accounting, finance, or controllership experience and can confidently manage financial operations in a remote work environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Manage budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning

- Support accounts payable, accounts receivable, payroll, and general ledger processes

- Maintain compliance with accounting standards, tax requirements, and internal controls

- Coordinate with external accountants, bookkeepers, auditors, or tax professionals when needed

- Analyze financial data and provide recommendations to management

- Help improve financial systems, reporting workflows, and operational efficiency

- Maintain confidentiality of all financial and company information



QUALIFICATIONS



- Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy, Finance, Business, or a related field preferred

- CPA is an advantage but not required

- Strong understanding of financial statements, reporting, reconciliations, and budgeting

- Experience with accounting software, spreadsheets, and financial management tools

- Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Excellent communication skills, especially in a remote work environment

- Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and handle sensitive financial information professionally



IDEAL CANDIDATE



- Reliable and highly organized

- Comfortable working with a remote team

- Proactive and able to identify financial issues before they become bigger problems

- Professional, trustworthy, and discreet

description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: N8N/Make Automation Specialist
description:
Position: Automation Specialist (N8N & Make Expert)



Type: Part-Time (With Clear Path to Full-Time)

Compensation: $6–$8/hour to start (performance-based growth)

Industry: Service-Based Businesses (USA)



We’re a fast-growing service-based company looking to bring on a high-level Automation Specialist who is exceptionally strong with N8N and Make.



This role is not for beginners, template builders, or people who only know surface-level GoHighLevel automations.



We’re looking for someone who can step into a business, identify operational bottlenecks, and architect real automation systems that improve speed, accuracy, and scalability across the entire company.



This starts part-time, with a clear path to full-time as you prove impact and ownership.



Our Culture



Tight-knit, execution-focused team

High communication standards

Ownership > task completion

We move fast and expect accountability

You’re encouraged to think, challenge systems, and improve them



If you like autonomy, responsibility, and building systems that actually matter, you’ll fit in well.



Your Responsibilities

Design, build, and maintain advanced automations using N8N and Make

Analyze existing workflows and identify inefficiencies and bottlenecks

Architect automation systems that improve:

Lead handling

Data flow



CRM accuracy



Internal operations

Reporting & tracking

Build custom logic-based automations, not just simple triggers

Improve data tracking, reliability, and visibility across systems



Connect and sync multiple platforms (CRMs, forms, spreadsheets, APIs, internal tools, etc.)



Document systems clearly so they’re scalable and maintainable

Collaborate closely with leadership to align automations with business goals

Proactively suggest better system designs and optimizations



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)

Strong, proven experience with N8N and Make



Ability to:



Map complex workflows

Design logic-heavy automations

Handle edge cases and failure states

Deep understanding of:

Data flow & structuring



Webhooks & APIs



Conditional logic & branching

Error handling & monitoring

Ability to enter an existing business and improve systems, not just build isolated automations

Strong problem-solving and systems-thinking mindset

Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment



English Requirement (Important)



Strong English communication skills

Must communicate clearly in:

Written messages

Voice calls

Technical explanations & strategy discussions



Clear communication is mandatory. You’ll be working closely with decision-makers.



Bonus Skills (Big Plus, Not Required)



Experience automating across multiple CRMs or custom stacks

Familiarity with AI integrations (OpenAI, web scraping, enrichment, etc.)

Experience designing automation systems for scaling teams

Strong documentation habits

Willingness to learn and adapt quickly as systems evolve



Compensation & Growth



$6–$8/hour to start (part-time)

Performance-based increases

Clear opportunity to move into:



Full-time role

Increased responsibility

Systems ownership



We’re not looking for short-term freelancers — we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with the company.



How to Apply



Please include:



A brief overview of your N8N and Make experience

Include the word “apple” somewhere in your application (required)

Examples of automation systems you’ve built or improved

How you approach identifying bottlenecks in a business

Why you’d thrive in a tight-knit, high-performance team

title: AI Video Generator & Editor (Sora / Veo / AI Tools)

title: Web Developer
description:
Here’s a clean, high-quality job post you can drop straight into Upwork, Indeed, LinkedIn, or 
.

It’s positioned to attract serious web devs, not Fiverr-tier builders — and it emphasizes speed + polish, which is what you want.

Company: Scale Prediction

Industry: B2B Marketing & Client Acquisition (Blue-Collar / Home Services)

Niche: Cabinet Refinishing & Painting Companies

Type: Contract / Freelance (with potential ongoing work)



Overview



We’re a fast-growing B2B marketing company that helps cabinet refinishing and painting businesses generate exclusive, pre-qualified estimates.



We’re looking for a high-level web developer who can build a clean, modern, conversion-focused website with a quick turnaround.



This is not a generic brochure site — we want something polished, premium, and built to convert.



What We Need Built



A high-end marketing website (5–7 core sections or pages)

Strong visual hierarchy and clean UI

Clear positioning for a pay-per-estimate / performance-based offer

Designed for credibility, authority, and conversions

Fast load times and mobile-optimized

Built to scale (easy edits + future pages)



Must-Have Skills



Proven experience building modern B2B marketing websites

Strong understanding of conversion-rate optimization (CRO)

Clean, professional UI/UX (no templates that look cheap)

Fast execution — we move quickly

Ability to collaborate on structure and messaging



Tech stack is flexible, but experience with:



Webflow, Framer, or modern WordPress builds

Custom HTML/CSS/JS (bonus)

CMS setup (bonus)

Nice-to-Have



Experience in agency websites



Familiarity with blue-collar / home services brands

Copy-aware (understands how layout supports sales messaging)

Ongoing availability for edits, landing pages, and future builds



Timeline

Imediate start

Fast turnaround expected (initial version within days, not weeks)



Budget

Competitive, based on experience

We pay for quality + speed, not cheap work



To Apply



Please send:



2–4 relevant website examples (agency or high-end B2B preferred)

Your tech stack

How fast you can realistically deliver a polished first version

Why you’re a good fit for a fast-moving marketing company

title: Video Editor
description:
Company: B2B Marketing Agency for Contractors & Service Businesses

Type: Freelance / Part-time (as-needed)

Hours: Inconsistent & flexible (some weeks busy, some weeks very light)



Role Overview



We’re a B2B marketing company serving contractors, cabinet finishers, painters, and other service-based businesses. We’re looking for a highly competent freelance video editor we can keep on call to support our own company social media posts.



This is a gig-style role, not full-time and not guaranteed hours. Work will come in waves depending on campaigns and clients. Some weeks may have multiple projects, other weeks may have little to none. This is ideal for someone who already freelances or wants to stack clients.



Important – Please Read



This is as-needed freelance work.

Hours will be inconsistent

No weekly minimums guaranteed

Work volume will fluctuate



Best fit for editors comfortable with gig-based work



If you’re looking for stable or full-time employment, this role is not a good fit.



What You’ll Do



Edit ads, social media videos, and short-form content



Create and polish:



Instagram Reels / Shorts

Video ads

Client marketing videos

Add motion graphics, captions, text animations, and light VFX



Improve pacing, clarity, and visual engagement

Organize projects and deliver fast, clean revisions



Required Skills



High competence in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)

Experience with motion graphics (Premiere + After Effects or similar)



Strong understanding of:



Short-form editing

Ad creative

Social-first content

Ability to make clean, professional, conversion-focused edits

Reliable communication and turnaround times



Nice to Have

Experience editing for B2B, contractors, or service businesses

Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts formats

Basic color correction and audio cleanup



Why This Role Exists



We don’t need a full-time editor. We need a go-to editor who can jump in when projects come up and consistently deliver high-quality marketing edits.



How to Apply



Send:



Short intro

Portfolio (ads and short-form strongly preferred)

Your rate

Typical availability and turnaround time

Tools you use (confirm Premiere Pro)

title: Product Listing , Product Research , Post Scheduling , Meta Ads
description:
I have experience working as a Virtual Assistant where I helped with product listing and product management for online stores. My tasks included uploading products, writing product titles and descriptions, adding prices, and organizing product images on e-commerce platforms.



I also worked as a product lister, making sure that the product information is correct and attractive to customers. I organized product categories and checked that all listings were complete.



In addition, I have experience in basic video editing for social media content. I edited short videos, added text, and made simple adjustments to make the content more engaging for viewers.



I also helped with scheduling tasks, such as planning social media posts and organizing work schedules to make sure everything is posted on time.



Through these experiences, I developed skills in organization, time management, attention to detail, and communication, which are important for a Virtual Assistant role.

title: Advanced Bookkeeper (Controller-Level Experience)
description:
(For The Lookout Towers – Hiring Supported by Walden)



– FOLLOW THIS TO BE SHORTLISTED –

To apply:

1. Share the link to your resume

2. Mention your expected hourly rate ($/hour) and availability (Part time or full time)

3. Please summarize your relevant experience in bullet points related to bookkeeping, daily cash flow, financial reporting, and controller-level responsibilities, and include how soon you can start.



Role Overview

We are looking for an Advanced Bookkeeper who can support the day-to-day financial operations of The Lookout Towers. This role goes beyond basic bookkeeping.

You will help monitor daily cash flow, maintain financial records, and provide financial visibility that helps leadership make informed decisions. The ideal candidate has experience close to a Controller-level role within a growing company. 

This is not a full-scale CFO position, but we are looking for someone who is comfortable handling higher-level financial responsibilities. 



Responsibilities

 - Track and manage daily cash flow

 - Maintain accurate bookkeeping and financial records

 - Handle accounts payable and accounts receivable

 - Perform bank and credit card reconciliations

 - Monitor financial transactions and ensure proper documentation

 - Assist in preparing monthly financial reports

 - Support budget tracking and financial forecasting

 - Identify financial trends, risks, or discrepancies

 - Help build and monitor cost structures and revenue expectations across multiple balance sheets

 - Keep financial records organized for tax preparation and reporting

 - Work closely with leadership to provide financial insights when needed



Qualifications

- Proven experience as a Senior Bookkeeper, Financial Controller, or similar advanced accounting role

 - Strong experience with QuickBooks, Xero, or similar accounting systems

 - Solid understanding of cash flow management and financial reporting

 - High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

 - Ability to work independently and manage financial responsibilities with minimal supervision

 - Experience supporting founders or leadership teams is a strong advantage

 - Strong English communication skills



Shift Schedule

Must be able to coordinate with leadership in the MST (Mountain Standard Time) timezone



Why Work With The Lookout Towers

• Be part of a brand built on craftsmanship, elevated design, and meaningful experiences

 • Join a culture that values creativity, mindfulness, and attention to detail

 • Work in an environment that encourages individuality while aligning with a shared vision

 • Collaborate on projects that blend nature, innovation, and modern luxury

 • Work with a global, creative, and collaborative team



About The Lookout Towers

The Lookout Towers is a global collection of uniquely designed architectural retreats inspired by classic American fire towers. Each structure offers a blend of handcrafted integrity, modern comfort, and elevated design, inviting guests to pause, breathe, and rediscover their sense of wonder. Whether for personal stays, private builds, or investment opportunities, every tower carries its own identity while contributing to a larger vision of elevated living across North America and beyond.

title: OTR Fleet Team Member
description:
Fleet Operations Virtual Assistant (Trucking Experience Required)

GOZAL INC – Remote (Philippines)



GOZAL INC is a growing U.S.-based trucking company seeking an experienced Fleet Operations Virtual Assistant located in the Philippines to support our fleet management and maintenance coordination.



This role is ideal for someone who has previously worked with U.S. trucking companies, dispatch teams, or fleet maintenance operations. The position focuses on coordinating repairs, communicating with service providers, tracking maintenance issues, and assisting the operations team with fleet-related tasks.



Responsibilities



Assist with coordinating truck and trailer repairs with repair shops and roadside service providers across the U.S.



Research and locate repair facilities when drivers experience breakdowns



Communicate with repair shops to request quotes and negotiate service pricing when possible



Track maintenance issues and update fleet records



Assist drivers and dispatch with repair updates and service scheduling



Maintain organized records of repairs, invoices, and maintenance history



Help ensure fleet equipment is repaired quickly and efficiently



Support the operations team with fleet-related administrative tasks



Requirements



Previous experience working with a U.S. trucking company or fleet operations team



Experience assisting with fleet maintenance coordination, roadside service, or dispatch support



Strong written and spoken English



Strong communication skills when dealing with repair shops and vendors



Reliable internet connection



Ability to work during U.S. business hours when required



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Experience using Google Sheets / spreadsheets



Preferred Experience



Experience working with dispatch or maintenance departments



Familiarity with trucking terminology (tractor, trailer, breakdowns, road service)



Experience supporting U.S.-based trucking companies remotely



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary based on experience.



Application Instructions



To confirm that you read the full job description, please include the word “Turbo” at the end of your application message.



Applications that do not include this word may not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Agency Automation Specialist (n8n + GoHighLevel)
description:
WHAT WE DO:



Mindflowed Studios is a lead generation agency serving window tint and ceramic coating shops across the US. We run
 ad campaigns, generate the window tint and ceramic coating leads through those campaigns, and we've built our own complex workflow in n8n that closes all the clients leads for them, handles objections, collects a deposit, and books them into the shop calendar. Our tech stack is built on GoHighLevel, n8n, and various third-party integrations. We're looking for a full-time automation specialist to own and maintain our entire automation infrastructure.



To be considered for this role, you must start your application with the word "mindflowed," include your resume, and write a brief explanation of why you feel you'd be a good fit.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



You'll be the first point of contact when something breaks. 

When a client's lead follow-up sequence stops firing, when a calendar integration drops, when a webhook fails, or when an n8n workflow throws an error, you diagnose and fix it. 

Beyond troubleshooting, you'll build and improve automations that directly impact how our clients receive and convert leads.



Day to day, this looks like: maintaining and debugging n8n workflows that power lead distribution, follow-up sequences, and internal notifications across 17+ client sub-accounts; managing GoHighLevel automations including workflows, triggers, calendars, pipelines, and custom fields at both the agency and sub-account level; building and maintaining integrations between GHL, n8n,
 Lead Ads, Google Calendar, Stripe, and various other platforms via API and webhook connections; integrating LLM models (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) into automation workflows for tasks like lead qualification, follow-up message generation, and data enrichment; troubleshooting client-reported issues quickly, typically within the same business day; documenting every workflow, integration, and SOP so that nothing lives only in your head; and proactively identifying fragile or inefficient automations and proposing improvements.



WHAT YOU NEED:



Strong hands-on experience with n8n (not just Zapier or Make; we need someone who has built and maintained complex n8n workflows in production). 

Deep working knowledge of GoHighLevel at the agency level, including sub-account management, workflow builder, API, and webhook configuration. 

Comfort working with APIs, JSON, webhooks, and light coding (JavaScript/Python) for custom logic inside workflows. Experience with LLM/AI API integrations (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) in automation contexts. 

Prior experience working with or inside a digital marketing agency, specifically one that manages lead generation, appointment setting, or client CRM systems. 

Ability to troubleshoot under pressure; when a client's automations break, it affects their business and ours. Strong written English communication for documentation and async team updates.



PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED:



- Experience with
 Ads API or Meta Lead Ads integrations. Familiarity with Vercel, Notion API, or Stripe integrations. 

- Experience managing automations across 10+ client accounts simultaneously.



DETAILS:



This is a full-time remote position. Hours should overlap with North American business hours (Mountain Time, UTC-7) for at least 6-8 hours daily for real-time communication and urgent troubleshooting. Compensation will be discussed based on experience.



HOW TO APPLY:



Start your application with the word "mindflowed." Attach your resume. Write a short explanation of why you're a good fit for this role, including specific examples of n8n and GHL work you've done in an agency or lead generation context. Applications that don't follow these instructions won't be reviewed.

title: Customer Support Lead – Own & Structure CS

When something breaks on the site  a checkout bug, a payment error, a shipping mess  you're the one who catches it, diagnoses it, and drives the fix.



You report directly to the founder. You work async, remote, with European timezone overlap.



If you've been waiting for a role where you actually build something instead of just executing



-> FILL THIS FORM

title: Paid Media Specialist (All Channels - Google, Meta, TikTok & More)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Company: MetaOne Group

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Job Type: Full-Time (8 hours/day, PH Daytime schedule)

Compensation: $2.00 - $4.00 USD/hour. Starting rate is determined by your certifications, portfolio case studies, and proven track record of managing profitable campaigns across multiple platforms.

Career Track: Performance-based increases are built into our pay structure. As you hit KPIs and scale ad spend successfully across different channels, your wage and responsibilities will grow.



About Us:

MetaOne Group is a Canada-led, globally operated AI solutions and remote workforce company. We operate as a "Digital Assembly Line," helping B2B and B2C clients streamline their marketing and operations using AI tools and skilled human operators. We are looking for a versatile, data-driven paid media expert to own our clients' advertising presence across the entire digital landscape.



About the Role:

We are looking for a Paid Media Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize advertising campaigns across all major digital channels. You are not just a "Google Ads person" or a 
 person." You are a full-stack performance marketer who understands the strengths of each platform and knows how to orchestrate them together for maximum ROI.



You will manage budgets, analyze performance data, and continuously refine campaigns to meet specific business goals (leads, sales, or brand awareness). You will work closely with our content, automation, and creative teams to ensure your ads connect seamlessly with landing pages, CRM systems, and follow-up sequences.



Key Responsibilities:



Multi-Platform Campaign Management: Build, launch, and manage paid campaigns across:



Search & Display: Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, PMax)



Social Media: Meta Ads Manager 
 & Instagram)



Short-Form Video: TikTok Ads Manager



Emerging Platforms: Experience with LinkedIn, X/Twitter, or Xiaohongshu ads is a bonus



Cross-Platform Strategy: Develop cohesive paid media strategies that leverage the strengths of each channel (e.g., using Meta for top-of-funnel awareness and Google for bottom-of-funnel conversions).



Budget Optimization: Monitor daily budgets and bids across all platforms to maximize Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) and lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC).



A/B Testing at Scale: Write compelling ad copy and design split tests for headlines, creatives, and audiences to continuously improve Click-Through Rates (CTR) and Conversion Rates (CVR).



Conversion Tracking: Set up and maintain accurate conversion tracking using Google Tag Manager (GTM) and Google Analytics 4 (GA4) across all platforms.



Creative Collaboration: Work with our AI Content Creators to brief them on what visuals and video assets perform best on each platform.



Reporting: Generate weekly and monthly performance reports with clear insights and actionable recommendations for clients and internal stakeholders.



Required Tech & Marketing Stack:



Platform Expertise (Non-Negotiable):



Google Ads Manager (Search, Display, YouTube, PMax)



Meta Ads Manager 
 & Instagram)



TikTok Ads Manager



Analytics & Tracking:



Google Analytics 4 (GA4) for audience insights and behavior analysis



Google Tag Manager (GTM) for conversion tracking and event setup



Data Visualization:



Google Looker Studio (formerly Data Studio) to build live dashboards for clients



AI Utilization:



You must be comfortable using AI tools (like ChatGPT or Claude) to brainstorm ad copy, generate audience ideas, and analyze performance patterns faster



CRM Knowledge (Bonus):



Familiarity with CRMs like GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or Salesforce to understand how leads flow after the click



Requirements:



Proven Track Record: You have at least 2 years of experience managing paid ad accounts across at least two different platforms (e.g., Google + Meta, or Meta + TikTok) with real spend. Please provide case studies or examples of campaigns you have managed.



Platform-Agnostic Mindset: You don't play favorites. You recommend the right channel for the right goal, whether it's Google, Meta, TikTok, or something else.



Data-Driven: You make decisions based on numbers, not gut feelings. You understand metrics like Impression Share, Quality Score, Relevance Score, and Conversion Value.



Highly Analytical: You love spreadsheets and digging into data to find trends and opportunities.



Certifications: Active platform certifications (Google, Meta, TikTok) are a strong advantage.

title: Senior Operations & Financial Assistant (QuickBooks Enterprise)
description:
We are seeking a high-level Operations & Financial Assistant to manage our bookkeeping and daily business workflow. This is a full-time role requiring expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise. You will be responsible for maintaining our financial records while also serving as the backbone of our order processing, inventory management, and customer service.

• Inventory Control: Accurately enter and receive Purchase Orders (POs). Manage stock levels and perform Build Assemblies within QBD to reflect accurate finished goods.

• Order Entry: Monitor the company inbox for customer orders and enter them into QuickBooks with 100?curacy.

Qualifications & Skills:



• Experience: 4+ years of bookkeeping, specifically using QuickBooks Desktop (Enterprise preferred). Experience with US-based e-commerce or distribution is a major plus.

• Technical Setup: Must be comfortable working via Remote Desktop (RDP) or a hosted cloud environment.

• Inventory Knowledge: Proven experience handling Assemblies/BOM (Bill of Materials) and PO workflows.

• Communication: Exceptional written English for professional customer-facing
s.



Work Schedule & Compensation:



Rate: $7.00 + per hour  (based on experience).

Hours: Full-time | Remote | 9AM–5PM EST (40 hours/week).

Benefits: paid US holidays, and performance-based annual raises.

title: B2B Cold Calling Specialist / Sales Development Representative (Part-Time)
description:
About Engage365



Engage365 is a U.S.-based marketing agency that helps small businesses grow through social media management, digital advertising, SEO, review management, lead generation, websites, and other growth services.



We are expanding our outbound sales efforts and are looking for an experienced B2B cold caller to help generate qualified strategy calls with our sales team.



This role is NOT a closing role. Your responsibility is to identify qualified businesses and schedule strategy sessions with our Growth Strategist.



Compensation

• $10 per hour (20 hours per week)

• Bonus for every call booked

• Bonus for every booked call that attends the meeting

Strong performers can earn significant bonuses each month with additional kickers.



Responsibilities

• Make outbound cold calls to small businesses in assigned U.S. cities

• Identify business owners or decision makers

• Start conversations about improving their marketing and online visibility

• Pre-qualify prospects before scheduling appointments

• Schedule qualified strategy sessions on our sales calendar

• Log all call activity and notes in our CRM

• Follow call scripts and qualification guidelines

• Maintain professional communication with U.S. business owners



Lead Sources

You will identify businesses using sources such as:

• Google Maps

• LinkedIn

• Yelp

• Online business directories

You will be assigned specific U.S. cities/regions to prospect.



Qualification Requirements

Before scheduling a meeting, the prospect must meet basic criteria such as:

• Decision maker or owner is involved

• Active business with a website

• Currently doing some form of marketing

• Open to improving customer acquisition

You are responsible for ensuring only qualified prospects are scheduled.



Daily Expectations

• 40–70 outbound calls per day

• Professional conversations with business owners

• Book qualified strategy calls with our sales team

• Maintain accurate call notes and tracking

Quality matters more than volume. Meetings should be qualified and committed to attending.



Requirements

• Fluent English with clear, neutral accent

• Previous B2B cold calling experience REQUIRED

• Must be comfortable speaking with U.S. business owners

• Strong communication and persuasion skills

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment

• Ability to work U.S. Eastern business hours

Applicants without real B2B cold calling experience will not be considered.



Application Requirements

To be considered, you must include the following:

A voice recording sample introducing yourself

Details about your B2B cold calling experience



The results you achieved in past roles (appointments booked, deals generated, etc.)

The tools or CRM systems you have used

Applications without a voice sample will not be reviewed.



What Success Looks Like

A successful candidate will:

• Consistently book qualified meetings

• Communicate professionally with U.S. business owners

• Help generate new revenue opportunities for our sales team

This role may grow into a larger position for high performers.



We look forward to hearing from experienced outbound callers who are confident speaking with U.S. businesses and generating real opportunities.

title: Funnel builder with funnelish for dropshipping products
description:
We’re looking for a part-time Funnelish funnel builder to help us build funnels for our dropshipping brands.



Our team works mostly in the health and beauty space, and we launch new products regularly. Because of that, we’re looking for someone who can quickly put together clean, conversion-focused funnels using Funnelish.



This is a part-time position, ideal for someone who already has experience building funnels and wants consistent work on a flexible basis.



How the role works



You’ll be given:



• The product

• The funnel structure or template

• Copy and creative assets



Your job is to build the funnel in Funnelish, making sure everything looks good, works smoothly, and is mobile-friendly.



Sometimes you may build multiple funnels in a day, other times fewer. The workload can vary depending on product launches.



Payment



We pay per funnel completed, not hourly.

This works well for people who build funnels efficiently and prefer being paid based on output.



Requirements



• Experience using Funnelish

• Experience with dropshipping or DTC funnels

• Comfortable working with health and beauty products

• Able to build funnels quickly and reliably

• Good attention to detail



Markets



Our main market is The Netherlands, but we also work with funnels for:



• Germany

• Nordic countries

• Israel



You don’t need to speak these languages, but you should be comfortable working with localized funnels and international markets.



Communication



Our team communicates primarily through 
, so you should be comfortable using it for updates and coordination.

title: Shopify Product & Merchandising Virtual Assistant (Long-Term)
description:
Shopify Product & Merchandising Virtual Assistant (Long-Term)

Role: Shopify Virtual Assistant



Location: Remote (E-commerce)



Type: Part-Time (15–25 hrs/week) with growth to Full-Time



Compensation: $5 – $7 USD per hour (DOE)



We are seeking a detail-oriented professional to manage and organize our Shopify store. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on structured systems, clean data, and behind-the-scenes store optimization. We value long-term partnerships and consider our VAs an integral part of our business growth.



Key Responsibilities

1. Merchandising & Collections

Build and manage seasonal, launch-specific, and clearance collections.



Configure automatic/manual collection rules and test sorting logic.



Sync collections with homepage features and active marketing campaigns.



2. Inventory & Visibility Management

Monitor stock levels; d
 to hide, archive, or keep products visible.



Remove discontinued items and archive outdated seasonal stock.



Ensure out-of-stock items do not clutter filtered search results.



3. Product Data & SEO

Data Org: Refine descriptions, maintain consistent tags/vendors, and manage metafields for filters.



Media: Upload optimized images, alt text, and organize color swatches/size charts.



SEO: Write SEO titles/meta descriptions and maintain clean URLs.



Google Shopping: Ensure data meets Google Merchant Center requirements (GTIN/UPC accuracy).



4. Backend Maintenance & Sales Setup

Cleanup: Standardize tagging systems and remove unused collections/duplicate types.



Promotions: Set up sale collections, test discount codes, and update navigation for events.



Health Checks: Audit broken links, test filters, and monitor variant availability.



Requirements

Proven Shopify Experience: Deep familiarity with the backend is essential.



Detail Obsessed: You notice small errors others miss.



Technical Literacy: Ability to follow structured systems and maintain data integrity.



Communication: Strong written English and a reliable internet connection.

How to Apply

 & Instagram), Google, YouTube, and other advertising platforms

Editing & Production

Optimize content based on platform best practices



Operations & Systems Management

Organize marketing assets, documentation, and internal communications

title: Home Care Virtual Scheduler / Dispatcher (Full-Time Remote – Customer Service)
description:
We Are Looking for a Rockstar Scheduler & Office Admin



We are a growing Home Care Agency looking for a high-performing Virtual Scheduler & Office Administrator to join our team full-time. This role is critical to our operations and requires someone who is organized, tech-savvy, compassionate, and excellent at communication.



You will be responsible for managing caregiver schedules, coordinating with clients and staff, and ensuring that all care shifts are filled quickly and efficiently.



Our team is close-knit, supportive, and focused on delivering exceptional care to our clients and their families. We build relationships with our caregivers and clients from the very first phone call — and you will play a key role in that experience.

If you are detail-oriented, fast, reliable, and love working with people, we would love to hear from you.

________________________________________

IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING

Please apply ONLY if you meet the following criteria:

• You have excellent English communication skills (clear, professional, neutral accent)

• You are comfortable speaking on the phone with clients and caregivers daily

• You can commit to full-time work (40 hours per week)

• You have reliable (Wired with backup) high-speed internet and a professional home office setup

If you cannot meet these requirements, please do not apply.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Scheduling & Operations

• Manage daily caregiver scheduling and shift coordination

• Match the right caregiver to the right client based on needs, skills, and location

• Maintain an accurate caregiver availability chart

• Ensure all shifts are filled quickly and efficiently

• Monitor caregiver overtime and travel time

Client & Caregiver Communication

• Answer incoming calls from clients and families professionally

• Respond to scheduling requests, service inquiries, and questions

• Communicate regularly with caregivers to confirm schedules and shift coverage

• Handle last-minute scheduling changes and emergencies



Client Intake & Administration

• Process new client service requests and intake information

• Enter and update client data in the agency's software system

• Prepare reports, correspondence, and documentation

• Coordinate with the Operations Director and tea
mbers

Care Coordination

• Provide caregivers with accurate directions and client care instructions

• Follow up with caregivers regarding scheduling issues

• Communicate with clients, families, and referral partners when needed

________________________________________

Requirements

Experience

• 2–3 years of scheduling or administrative experience

• Experience working as a Virtual Assistant or Remote Administrator preferred

• Experience in home care, healthcare, or staffing coordination is a strong plus

Skills

• Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

• Strong customer service and people skills

• Excellent organization and time management

• Strong problem-solving ability

• Detail-oriented and highly dependable

• Able to work independently and as part of a team

Technical Skills

Must be comfortable with:

• Microsoft Excel, Word, and Google Workspace

• Scheduling software and digital communication tools

•
, instant messaging, and phone-based support

• Basic document preparation and data entry

________________________________________

Technical Requirements (Mandatory)

• Two monitors / dual screen setup

• Reliable high-speed wired internet (minimum 25 Mbps)

• Noise-cancelling headset with microphone

• Quiet, professional home office environment

________________________________________

About Our Company

A few things you should know about working with us:

• We are a Home Care Agency providing private-duty services for clients of all ages

• We move fast and value efficiency and accountability

• We treat our tea
mbers with respect, loyalty, and fairness

• If the business grows, our team benefits from that growth

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term — not just short-term work.

________________________________________

Compensation & Benefits

• Weekly or bi-weekly pay

• Performance-based bonuses

• Pay increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term growth opportunity

________________________________________

How to Apply

If you believe you are a great fit for this role, please follow the steps below:

1. Use this format for the subject line:

Virtual Scheduler – Your Name

2. In the first line of your application, please write:

“I am your Rockstar Scheduler.”

3. Record a short video introducing yourself, explaining:

• Who you are

• Your scheduling/customer service experience

• Why you would be a great fit for this role

4. Attach your resume

5. Include a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile

Applications that do not follow these outlined steps may not be considered.

________________________________________

Final Note

This is a long-term position. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our company for years — not weeks.

If you are organized, proactive, compassionate, and great with people, we would love to meet you.

title: Business Development Manager - Remote Sales Opportunity with iDriveSoCal
description:
Are you a driven sales professional ready to accelerate growth for a vibrant automotive media brand?

Picture yourself as the key player in expanding sales and partnerships in the exciting world of Southern California's automotive scene. At iDriveSoCal, we're more than just a media outlet—we're the go-to source for news, events, and insights that connect enthusiasts, brands, and opportunities. If you thrive on persistence, positivity, and results, this remote role offers the chance to build a rewarding, long-term career with direct mentorship from our founder!



About iDriveSoCal and Your Team:

iDriveSoCal (
) is Southern California's leading online automotive media brand, covering the latest news and events across the region. Founded by Tom Smith, who serves as publisher and producer, we're a growing platform passionate about the car culture. You'll work directly with Tom daily, benefiting from his guidance and collaboration to drive our shared success.



What You'll Be Doing - Fuel Sales and Partnership Growth:

Your role focuses on growing sales and partnerships for our online automotive media brand. Expect an engaging mix of:

- Researching companies, finding key contacts, and identifying opportunities in the automotive industry.

- Outbound cold calling and targeted calls to gather contact information and build relationships.

- Leveraging
 as a vital tool for outreach, follow-ups, and closing deals.



This position is all about working smart and hard—persistently pursuing leads with an infectiously positive attitude and unwavering follow-up to turn prospects into lasting partnerships.



Your Schedule - Remote Work During US Business Hours:

You'll operate Monday through Friday during regular Pacific Standard Time (PST) business hours, making it ideal for remote talent in the Philippines who value structure and work-life balance without the daily commute.



What You Bring - Essential Skills and Mindset:

To succeed and stand out, you must be a business development and sales all-star with:

- Mastery of English: Exceptional speaking and writing skills, including proper grammar and punctuation, for professional communication.

- Proven Sales Expertise: Strong track record in outbound prospecting, relationship-building, and deal-closing.

- Ingrained Qualities: Persistence, perseverance, an infectiously positive attitude, and relentless follow-up in every aspect of your work.

- Technical Requirements: A rock-solid, always-on internet connection; necessary hardware like a computer, headphones, and microphone; and a quiet, controlled environment perfect for making and receiving calls.



We're seeking someone who's always exploring ways to improve themselves, our processes, and our results—if that's you, you're the stellar candidate we're excited to connect with!



Tools and Support Provided:

We'll equip you for peak performance:

- All necessary software, including a professional
 address via Google Workspace.

- CRM system with integrated calling features.

- Access to comprehensive sales materials and resources.

- Daily access to and personalized guidance from founder Tom Smith to help you grow and excel.



Your Future Here - Long-Term Investment and Growth:

This is a full-time, remote position where we're investing in you for the long term—both with time and resources. We're looking for a dedicated partner to work with us for many years, becoming an essential part of the team as we expand together.



Compensation and Benefits & Valuing Your Contributions:

In addition to a competitive salaried financial compensation, after a few months of successful collaboration, you'll enjoy paid vacation time, paid time off, and paid sick leave to support your well-being.



Ready to Drive Success Together?

If you're eager to work smart and hard in a role that rewards your efforts, apply now by sending your resume and a note on why you're a great fit.  We can't wait to connect and build the future of iDriveSoCal with you! Thanks for your interest.

title: Customer Service Manager (Shopify / Gorgias) - $1,800-$2,500/month
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



Salary: $1,800 - $2,500 per month depending on experience

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: US business hours (night shift in the Philippines)




 is a US ecommerce company selling design products to customers across the United States.



We are hiring a Customer Service Manager based in the Philippines to manage and improve our customer support operations.



This role combines team management and hands-on customer support. Approximately 50% of your time will be spent managing the support team and processes, and 50% handling customer inquiries directly.



You will report directly to the founder and work closely with the operations team.



We are looking for someone highly organised, process-driven, and experienced with ecommerce customer service.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Manage a small customer service team (1-2 ppl)

- Manage the daily operations of the customer service team

- Handle customer tickets, live chat inquiries

- Handle inbound and outbound calls

- Ensure fast and professional responses to all customers

- Monitor and improve response times and customer satisfaction

- Train and support customer service agents

- Improve customer service processes and documentation

- Work inside Shopify and Gorgias to manage tickets

- Escalate operational issues when needed

- Report weekly customer service metrics

- Analyse customer support data and reduce ticket volume by improving the FAQ, help centre, and AI chatbot responses



REQUIREMENTS



- 2+ years experience working in Shopify-based ecommerce customer support

- Experience using Gorgias or similar helpdesk software

- Previously reported directly to a US or international manager

- Excellent spoken and written English suitable for US customers

- Experience managing a small support team

- Comfortable handling customer tickets directly

- Highly organised and process-driven

- Stable work history with long tenures



IDEAL CANDIDATES

- Strong communicator with excellent English

- Calm and professional when handling difficult customers

- Comfortable working US business hours

- Detail-oriented and organised

- Experienced in ecommerce customer support



IMPORTANT:

Please answer the screening questions below. Applicants without answers will not be reviewed. 



SCREENING QUESTIONS



1. Shopify experience



How many years have you worked in Shopify-based ecommerce customer service? Please name the companies.



2. Helpdesk software



Which customer support platforms have you used? (Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk etc)



3. Team management



How many customer service agents have you managed?



4. US customers



Have you previously worked with US ecommerce customers? (Yes / No)



5. Work hours



Are you comfortable working US business hours? (Yes / No)



6. Stability



Please briefly explain your last three roles and how long you stayed in each position.



7. KPI-driven environment



Are you comfortable working in a KPI-driven environment where productivity tools such as ActivTrak are used and monitored? (Yes / No)



8. Recruitment process



Our recruitment process includes completing a short TestGorilla assessment and organising reference calls with your last three direct managers if you reach the final stage. Are you comfortable with this process? (Yes / No)



9. Ecommerce experience



What type of ecommerce products did the company sell? (e.g. furniture, fashion, electronics etc)

title: AI SEO & Digital Authority Specialist (AEO Expert)
description:
We are a luxury real estate group looking for an AI Search & Content Specialist to dominate our online presence. You will focus on AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and SEO to ensure our brand is the #1 authority cited by AI tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google Gemini) and search engines. You will work alongside our Automation Engineer to turn our marketing into a high-speed AI engine.



Key Responsibilities:

 * AEO & SEO Strategy: Optimize our website and content so AI models recommend us as the top luxury experts in Sherman Oaks and Studio City.

 * AI Content Architecture: Use AI to rapidly produce high-end keywords, YouTube SEO (titles/tags), and newsletter research.

 * Digital Presence & PR: Use AI tools to build a massive online footprint, including automated press releases and authority-building articles.

 * Prompt Engineering: Write and refine complex prompts that ensure all AI-generated client materials (Buyer Guides, Pre-Listing Packets) maintain a "white-glove" luxury tone.

 * Keyword Intelligence: Stay ahead of local market trends using AI to surface high-volume search terms before the competition.



Required Skills:

 * Mastery of AI Search: Deep understanding of how AI "answers" are generated and how to influence them (AEO).

 * Advanced SEO: Proven track record of ranking content in highly competitive luxury niches.

 * Prompt Engineering: Ability to "train" AI to speak in our specific brand voice.

 * Speed of Execution: Using AI to do in 10 minutes what used to take 2 hours.



Why Join Us?

You will be the "brain" behind our digital authority, while our technical team handles the automation builds. Your focus is 100% on visibility, brand dominance, and search rankings.



How to Apply:

 * Use the subject line: "Authority Architect Found: [Your Name]"

 * Explain the difference between SEO and AEO in two sentences.

 * List your 3 favorite AI tools for keyword and market research.

 * Include your favorite local coffee shop so I know you read this!
