title: SEO Specialist
description:
Wings Of The Future is a mission-driven organization committed to making a positive impact by helping individuals heal and grow through trauma-informed services. We work at the intersection of emotional wellness, professional growth, and sustainable support. Our approach is not fear-based or exploitative but grounded in integrity, clarity, emotional safety, and long-term trust.



We are seeking a strategic, ethical SEO Specialist to help elevate the online presence of our mission. This role is ideal for someone who understands that SEO goes beyond rankings, it’s about connecting the right people with the right services at the right time. The SEO Specialist will drive organic growth, build authority, and ensure that all SEO efforts are in alignment with our trauma-informed messaging and brand voice.



This is a perfect opportunity for someone who is passionate about SEO and has experience in content-driven organizations, especially those focused on mission and service rather than just commercial success.



Key Responsibilities



-SEO Strategy & Execution

-Develop and execute a comprehensive SEO strategy that aligns with organizational goals and growth.

-Conduct keyword research to target ethical messaging and audience intent while focusing on long-term authority.

-Build and manage content clusters, pillar pages, and internal linking strategies.

-Optimize existing content without compromising emotional safety or tone.

-Monitor rankings, traffic, and conversions; adjust strategies based on data insights.

-Content & Collaboration

-Collaborate with content creators, designers, and leadership to guide SEO-informed content creation.

--Provide clear SEO guidance to non-technical tea
mbers.

-Ensure all content aligns with Google’s EEAT standards, particularly for sensitive subjects.

-Support SEO for lead magnets, blogs, webinars, and evergreen resources.

-Technical SEO

-Troubleshoot and resolve technical SEO issues (site structure, indexing, crawlability, performance).

-Monitor and report on data through Google Search Console, GA4, and other SEO tools.

-Work closely with web developers to implement necessary improvements.

-Stay updated on algorithm changes and SEO best practices.

-Analytics & Reporting

-Track SEO performance with transparency and clarity.

-Measure the impact of SEO efforts on lead generation and conversion.

-Provide actionable insights and data-driven recommendations.

-Set clear, realistic timelines for SEO growth.



Required Qualifications

-3+ years of hands-on SEO experience

-Proven track record of growing organic traffic and driving conversions

-Expertise in on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

-Experience working with content-driven organizations or services

-Proficiency in tools such as Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, SEMrush

-Ability to communicate SEO concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders

-Preferred (Nice to Have)

-Experience in trauma-informed or mental health-related sectors

-Understanding of ethical marketing and trauma-informed communication

-Familiarity with AI-assisted SEO tools (used responsibly)

-Experience with supporting lead funnels, programs, and online courses



What We Value

-Integrity and long-term trust over quick wins

-Clear communication and collaboration with no egos

-An ethical, mindful approach to marketing and SEO

-Respect for sensitive, emotionally-driven subject matter

-Strong commitment to the organization’s mission and values

-What Success Looks Like

-Sustainable growth in organic traffic and lead generation

-Improved rankings for high-intent, mission-aligned keywords

-Strong collaboration with the marketing team and other departments

-SEO that enhances the organization’s voice and mission, rather than diminishing it



How to Apply

Please submit the following to be considered for this role:

-A resume or LinkedIn profile

-A brief summary of your SEO approach, especially in mission-driven or sensitive sectors

-One example of a project where SEO drove meaningful business results





If you’re passionate about making a real impact through strategic SEO in a mission-driven, trauma-informed environment, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We’re Hiring: Social Media + YouTube Virtual Assistant (Part-Time)



I’m Krystal, founder of Wings of the Future, a trauma-informed coaching company helping high-achieving professionals recover from burnout and redesign their lives. I’m growing my visibility on LinkedIn and YouTube, and I need a detail-driven, creative VA to help manage and amplify our content strategy.



 This role is for someone who:

 • Is experienced in YouTube channel management (thumbnails, titles, descriptions, tags, SEO)

 • Can edit 3–15 min talking-head style videos with captions, cuts, and simple animations

 • Understands LinkedIn content strategy (carousel posts, polls, text posts)

 • Can schedule and post across LinkedIn and YouTube consistently

Can DM on LinkedIn

 • Is emotionally intelligent and aligned with trauma-informed or wellness content

 • Is reliable, organized, and communicates clearly



????? Responsibilities

 • Upload weekly YouTube videos with optimized titles, descriptions, tags, end cards

 • Create and schedule posts to LinkedIn (5x per week)

 • Repurpose long-form content into short posts, carousels, and DMs

 • Reply to comments or DMs using provided scripts or tone guidelines

 • Track analytics and report growth/progress weekly



 Bonus skills (not required, but helpful):

 • Canva graphic design (carousel posts, YouTube thumbnails)

 • Experience with Descript, CapCut, Adobe Express, or Canva Video

 • Comfortable learning my tone and speaking to burnout recovery, nervous system healing, and trauma-informed leadership



???? Tools We Use

 • Canva, Trello, Google Drive, Descript/CapCut, LinkedIn, YouTube Studio



???? Details

 • Start: ASAP

 • Hours: 10–15 hours/week to start (may grow)

 • Pay: $6-10hr depending on experience

 • Location: Remote, async-friendly but must be responsive to messages M–F



How to Apply:



 
 with:

 1. A short intro and why you’re passionate about this kind of work

We’re not just pushing content. We’re helping people heal through stories, strategy, and deep healing tools.

If that speaks to you, you might be the one.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 40,000 - Php 65,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Shopify Post Purchase Implementation Specialist
description:
Who We Are:



At Escend Media, we help D2C brands implement retention strategies that increase profit and drive customer retention. We want to be the ‘who’ behind
s that people ask ‘dannngg, who designed that’. 

What We Do:

We help 7 and 8 figure ecommerce businesses develop, optimize and scale their owned media marketing efforts. Whether they are just looking to start
 marketing, they need to really refine what they are currently doing or they need someone to take
 marketing off their shoulders, we’re here to help them so that they can focus on running the business.



Our clients are leaders in their industry and have built strong relationships with the customers they serve. Our job is to ensure that their brand image stays consistent online and offline and, more importantly, that their business is growing. 





Summary of The Position:



The Post Purchase Implementation Specialist is responsible for the strategic implementation and optimization of post-purchase upsell funnels, primarily utilizing platforms like Aftersell. This role focuses on enhancing Average Order Value (AOV) and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) for Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) e-commerce brands by creating highly relevant and effective post-purchase offers. The specialist will manage the full lifecycle of implementation, from strategic planning and A/B testing to performance monitoring and continuous optimization, ensuring seamless integration and alignment with brand objectives.



Responsibilities:



• Implement and manage post-purchase upsell funnels using platforms such as Aftersell, ensuring alignment with strategic objectives to increase AOV and CLTV.

• Conduct systematic A/B testing across various elements including product selection, offer and pricing structures, pricing angles, copywriting, psychological angles, user interface (UI) optimization, and customer segmentation.

• Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) such as Acceptance Rate, AOV Lift, Incremental Profit/Session, and Upsell Conversion Rate, optimizing for Revenue Per Visitor (RPV) and Profit Per Visitor (PPV).

• Ensure technical and creative requirements are met for all implementations, including fulfillment safety (e.g., 'Order on Hold' feature), mobile responsiveness, brand consistency, and effective inventory management.

• Collaborate with marketing and design teams to ensure brand consistency and compelling offer presentation.

• Identify and avoid common pitfalls such as the 'Wall of Text' error and the 'Irrelevance' trap, focusing on clear value propositions and relevant offers.

• Leverage customer data, loyalty programs, and other add-ons to enhance post-purchase strategies and maximize incremental revenue.

• Continuously refine and improve post-purchase strategies based on performance data and evolving market trends.



Our Culture:



• No one is bigger than the team

• We don’t make excuses, we take responsibility

• Innovate everywhere

• Communicate. Communicate. Communicate. We have a culture of open communication.



Required Skills:



• Proven experience in implementing and optimizing post-purchase upsell strategies, preferably with platforms like Aftersell.

• Strong understanding of e-commerce metrics and their impact on business growth (AOV, CLTV, ROAS, RPV, PPV).

• Demonstrated expertise in A/B testing methodologies and data-driven optimization.

• Excellent attention to detail and a commitment to quality assurance in all implementations.

• Knowledge of mobile UI/UX best practices for e-commerce.

• Ability to analyze performance data and translate insights into actionable strategies.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex ideas clearly.

• Experience with project management software (e.g., Clickup) is a plus.

• Proactive approach with a sense of urgency and purpose in daily tasks.



Perks:

- Flexible working hours

- Remote working

- Room to grow - we're an early stage start up with a proven track record

- Competitive compensation

- Work with some amazing brands



This Role Is Perfect for You If…



- You love working as a team.

- You are a self-starter. 

- You can work under pressure

- You have exceptional communication skills

- You are results/outcome driven. 

- You have a ‘can-do’ attitude. If “that’s not my job” isn’t in your vocabulary, you’ll fit in great!



This Role is NOT the Right Fit For You If You Are…

- A ‘me first’ type of person

- Not a self-starter.

- Not a ‘people person’ 

- Problem driven, not solution oriented. If you complain about problems/issues/bottlenecks, without proposing a solution, this is not for you.

- Looking for a typical 9-5. If you hate Mondays, this is not for you. We’re a mission-driven company who are all about changing the lives and businesses that we work with. If we have something that needs to get done, we’ll have all hands on deck. Sometimes you might have to work late but sometimes you’ll get the afternoon off, it’s not all work no play, but we’re here to help business grow!

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Order Management Specialist
description:

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.

Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!

title: Paid Ads Manager for Ecom/DTC
description:
We’re Looking For Someone Who Can Push Budget, Launch Tests Fast, And Scale Winners.

We care about execution, speed, and results.



At fatjoe, we run paid acquisition across multiple channels and constantly test new offers, creatives, and campaigns. That means lots of ads, lots of iterations, and lots of data.



If you can’t handle high testing velocity, large numbers of creatives, and aggressive scaling, this role isn’t for you.

But if you can… keep reading.



About fatjoe

fatjoe delivers marketing services to thousands of agencies and brands worldwide.

Bootstrapped and founder-led. No corporate bureaucracy.

We’ve grown to $15M+ annual revenue with a lean team under 20 people, and we’re just getting started.



Our mission is simple: Build the most scalable marketing services platform in the world.



To do that, we need people who move fast and care about results.

Not meetings.

Not bureaucracy.

Not corporate theatre.



The Role

We run a lot of ads. We test a lot of creatives. We push budgets when things work.

Your job is to launch, manage, and optimise paid campaigns across Meta Ads, Google Ads & Linkedin Ads, while keeping our testing machine running smoothly.

This is not a beginner's role.



You’ll be expected to:

* Launch campaigns quickly and correctly

* Manage large volumes of creatives

* Monitor performance daily

* Identify winners and scale budgets

* Kill losers fast

* Keep campaigns organised and structured



Execution speed matters.

If you’re slow, disorganised, or afraid to push budgets — this isn’t the job for you.



Responsibilities:

* Launch and manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns at scale

* Upload and test large volumes of creatives on Meta

* Manage Search, Performance Max, and display campaigns on Google

* Monitor campaign performance daily across both platforms

* Work with creators and platforms on ad creative

* Identify winning creatives, audiences, and keywords

* Scale budgets aggressively when campaigns perform

* Cut losing ads quickly

*Maintain clear campaign structures and naming conventions

* Troubleshoot ad delivery issues, rejections, and tracking problems

* Report key metrics clearly (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, etc.)

* Work closely with our marketing team to keep the testing system running



Requirements:

You’ve done this before.

Not theory. Not a course. Real ad accounts.



Minimum requirements:

* 2+ years managing Meta Ads and Google Ads.

* Strong experience running Meta creative testing campaigns

* Experience managing Google Search and Performance Max

* Experience managing high-volume ad accounts

* Comfortable launching large numbers of creatives

* Strong understanding of ad metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM)



Bonus Points:

* Advanced Google Ads optimisation experience

* Experience with eCommerce or DTC brands

* Experience managing £75k+ month ad spend

* Experience writing or briefing ad copy



This Role Is NOT For



This role is not for people who:

* Need constant supervision

* Work slowly

* Overcomplicate simple tasks

* Don’t understand Ads Manager

* Panic when budgets increase

* Can’t handle launching multiple campaigns daily

* Make careless setup mistakes



We move fast and expect people to keep up.



Compensation

Salary: $1000-$1200 per month (depending on experience)



Benefits:

* Fully remote and full-time role

* Work with a small, high performance marketing team

* Direct access to founder

* No corporate politics or bureaucracy



Hiring Process:

We keep things simple.

1. Submit your application here: 

**Note: you will need to record a short video intro

2. Short screening interview

3. Practical assessment

4. Offer



Ready to Apply?



If you:

* Love running paid ads

* Enjoy testing lots of creatives

* Can move fast without making mistakes

* Know how to scale winners



Then apply.

If not, this probably isn’t the role for you.

title: E-Commerce Marketing Manager

Reports To: Operations Manager

Company: Gear Elevation

Employment Type: Full-time (Remote)

Industry: Ecommerce / Dropshipping



About Gear Elevation:

Gear Elevation is a fast-scaling ecommerce company focused on identifying winning products and growing them through high-performing paid ads, data-driven decisions, and strong creative execution. Our team operates remotely with specialized roles across product research, marketing, creatives, and operations.



We are looking for a Marketing Manager who will lead the marketing function under the guidance of the Operations Manager, ensuring campaigns are executed efficiently, profitably, and in alignment with company goals.



Role Overview:

The Marketing Manager will oversee all marketing activities related to paid advertising and creative production. This role focuses on execution, optimization, and coordination — not just strategy.

You will act as the bridge between leadership strategy and the marketing team’s daily work, ensuring campaigns launch smoothly, creatives perform well, and budgets are used efficiently.



Key Responsibilities:

-Paid Advertising Management

-Manage, launch, and optimize paid campaigns across:

 & Instagram Ads

TikTok Ads

Other platforms as needed

- Monitor KPIs such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPM, and conversion rates

- Scale profitable campaigns while controlling ad spend

- Implement structured testing for audiences, creatives, and funnels

- Coordinate closely with media buyers



Creative Direction & Performance:

- Develop marketing angles and messaging for product campaigns

- Create clear briefs for designers, video editors, and copywriters

- Review creatives before launch to ensure quality and alignment

- Analyze creative performance and request iterations

- Stay updated on trends and competitor ads



Team Coordination:

- Coordinate workflow between:

Creative team (designers, editors)

Media buyers

Product researchers

Operations Manager



- Ensure deadlines are met and bottlenecks are addressed

- Maintain organized documentation of campaigns and tests

- Support smooth execution from concept to scaling



Reporting & Optimization:

- Track marketing performance and provide regular reports to the Operations Manager

- Identify issues affecting profitability or scaling

- Recommend actionable improvements

- Ensure marketing efforts align with overall operational goals



Required Qualifications:

- Proven experience managing paid ads for ecommerce or dropshipping

- Strong knowledge of
 and 
 advertising platforms

- Experience coordinating creative production

- Data-driven mindset with strong analytical skills

- Ability to optimize campaigns for profitability

- Strong organizational and communication skills

- Comfortable working in a structured, team-based environment

- Ability to follow leadership direction while taking initiative



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with Shopify-based stores

- Familiarity with product testing workflows in dropshipping

- Understanding of direct-response marketing principles

- Experience working with remote teams

- Knowledge of Advantage+ or automated campaign types



Key Success Indicators:

- Consistent profitable ad performance

- Efficient creative testing pipeline

- Strong coordination across marketing functions

- Timely reporting and communication

- Contribution to overall company growth targets



Why Join Gear Elevation?

- Work with an established ecommerce team and structure

- Clear leadership and operational support

- Opportunity to influence major growth initiatives

- Remote work flexibility

- Performance-driven environment



Organizational Context:

- This role is part of the Marketing function under Operations and will report directly to the Operations Manager. The Marketing Manager is responsible for executing and coordinating marketing initiatives, not company-wide operations or administrative functions.



How to apply:

Please fill up the form -

title: Figma UI/UX Designer
description:
Who We Are:

 - We are a focused product team building and evolving a suite of internal and customer-facing applications, including web admin tools, signage systems, and smart TV applications. Our work includes both new product development and ongoing improvements to existing production tools.

 - This is a part-time contract role starting at approximately 10 hours per week. Workload will vary based on active projects, and we want someone comfortable with that flexibility. If the relationship works well and work expands, there is potential for the role to grow over time.



The Role:

 - We are looking for a UI/UX Designer with strong Figma expertise who can take product requirements and translate them into clean, developer-ready designs — fast. This is a design execution role, not a brand strategy role. You will work within an existing design framework and system, producing screens, flows, and components that developers can build directly from.

 - Primary focus will be on Conqrse and AEO projects. You will take PRDs and convert them into usable UI so developers are never in the position of making layout decisions themselves.

 - This role is a part-time contract position with hours that will flex based on active project needs.



Key Responsibilities:

 - Translate PRDs and wireframes into polished, developer-ready Figma files.

 - Work within the existing design system — extending it, not reinventing it.

 - Produce screens, flows, and component specs across desktop, tablet, and mobile as needed.

 - Build and maintain reusable components, variants, and patterns within Figma.

 - Document component states, usage guidelines, and design decisions clearly for engineers.

 - Iterate quickly on feedback from the PM and team leads.

 - Collaborate async with developers and PM using modern, AI-assisted workflows (Antigravity, MCP, etc.).

 - Participate in brief check-ins with overlap during U.S. hours.





What You Bring:

 - Strong Figma expertise — components, variants, auto-layout, styles, and tokens.

 - Experience building and maintaining reusable design systems for long-running products.

 - Ability to break down complex apps into consistent layouts, components, and patterns.

 - Good visual design sense: hierarchy, spacing, typography, color, and contrast.

 - Comfortable working from existing templates and systems rather than starting from scratch.

 - Understands responsive design and can design for desktop, tablet, and phone.



Collaboration:

 - Comfortable working async with developers and PM, iterating quickly on feedback.

 - Able to document components, states, and usage clearly for engineers.

 - Comfortable collaborating with AI-assisted workflows and tools.

 - Good English communication skills.





Why Join Us:

 - Part-time contract starting at ~10 hours per week — flexible and project-driven.

 - Potential for the role to grow as projects and workload expand.

 - Ownership of real product screens used in live applications.

 - Small, supportive team where your work has direct impact.

 - Modern workflow using AI tools and current best practices.



Design Test:

All applicants will be given a short design test (~1 hour) as part of the hiring process. You will be provided with existing design elements and asked to build components and two views within Figma. This is not a test of creativity or brand vision — it is a test of your ability to work accurately and efficiently within an existing system.



Portfolio Requirement:

Please include at least one example of a robust design system or multi-page web app built in Figma. We want to see how you organize files, structure components, and hand them off to developers.

title: Business Process Admin (experienced in Sharepoint)
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Business Process Admin or Visual Communication Admin plays a key role in supporting internal operations by managing and updating content in company information hubs, creating visually compelling slide decks, and contributing to content development per Cardone Ventures’ brand guidelines. This role combines administrative coordination with creative execution, ensuring that internal documents, presentations, and shared resources are well-organized, up-to-date, and aligned with brand standards.



The Business Process Admin / Visual Communication Admin position is highly independent but will provide support to all departments within our organization. You will need to deliver results in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and be dependable and reliable in meeting deadlines and targets.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Maintains and organizes key platforms like SharePoint, Asana, Trainual, and internal content hubs to ensure tea
mbers have reliable access to accurate, branded, and up-to-date resources.

- Creates polished slide decks, branded visuals, and instructional content that enhance both internal and external experiences, ensuring messaging is clear, consistent, and aligned with company standards.

- Serves as a cross-functional connector by capturing and refining processes, coordinating updates, and promoting best practices that streamline communication, reduce inefficiencies, and support scalable growth.





OBJECTIVES

- Maintain and update internal platforms such as SharePoint, Asana, Trainual, and the in-house LMS to ensure content is accurate, accessible, and aligned with business needs.

- Create and manage branded content including slide decks, templates, and instructional materials to support onboarding, internal communication, and cross-team initiatives.

- Transcribe and format content fro
etings or recorded walkthroughs into clear, structured documentation for reference and training.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure timely task completion, content updates, and accountability across platforms.





COMPETENCIES

- Strong business acumen with the ability to understand operational priorities and translate them into effective solutions.

- Thorough grasp of company principles, frameworks, and messaging, with the ability to translate them into clear, engaging training content and internal communications that reinforce alignment and learning.

- Proficiency in visual tools and process mapping software such as L
, Microsoft Visio, or similar platforms.

- Experience with project management tools (e.g., Asana) and productivity suites including G-Suite (Slides, Docs) and Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Word, Excel).

- Ability to produce clear, accurate documentation and visual content that simplifies complex information for diverse teams.

- High attention to detail, with a focus on quality control and consistency in branding, formatting, and content delivery.

- Skilled in creating standardized templates and assets that can be leveraged across the organization.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in administrative, operations, or content-focused roles.

- Prior experience supporting internal systems, content development, or process documentation in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment is a plus.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: General Virtual Assistant for ACS Electrical WA
description:
Job Overview

ACS Electrical WA is looking for a highly organized, proactive, and reliable General Virtual Assistant to support daily administrative operations, internal systems, and content related tasks. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both structured administrative work and creative tasks like content organization and blog publishing.



You will work closely with the team to help maintain smooth business operations, organize project information, support internal systems, and assist with basic marketing tasks such as blog posting and content generation.



This role requires someone who is detail oriented, dependable, and able to manage multiple tasks while maintaining strong organization.



Key Responsibilities



Administrative Support

• Organize and maintain company documents, folders, and internal files

• Assist with creating, editing, and formatting documents, reports, and spreadsheets

• Maintain organized digital records for projects, tasks, and internal documentation

• Help track tasks and ensure important items are completed on schedule



Operations Support

• Assist with managing and organizing work orders and job information within the company project management system (Fergus)

• Update project details, notes, and documentation for electrical jobs

• Help maintain organized job records for estimates, invoices, and project files

• Support internal operational workflows and documentation



Scheduling and Coordination

• Assist with scheduling meetings and managing calendars

• Help coordinate internal team communications and follow ups

• Track task progress and assist in ensuring deadlines are met



Content and Blog Support

• Assist with drafting and organizing blog posts related to electrical services, industry topics, and company updates

• Publish blog posts on the company website or CMS platform

• Format blog articles to ensure readability and proper structure

• Conduct basic research for blog topics related to electrical services and industry trends

• Repurpose existing content for website posts, newsletters, or social media

• Assist with organizing a content calendar for blog publishing



Content Generation and Marketing Support

• Help generate simple written content for blogs, website updates, and internal materials

• Assist with formatting and uploading website content

• Support basic SEO practices such as adding headings, keywords, and meta descriptions to blog posts

• Assist in organizing marketing assets and content folders



General Business Support

• Conduct research for operational, marketing, or administrative needs

• Assist in documenting company processes and internal workflows

• Help maintain organization across operational systems and digital tools

• Provide general virtual assistance to support the team as needed



Requirements



• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Comfortable using online tools, documents, and spreadsheets

• Reliable internet connection and professional working environment



Application Requirements



Applicants are encouraged to submit the following:

• Updated resume or CV

• Portfolio of previous work (if available), especially related to admin support, content writing, or blog management

• A short introduction video sharing your background and experience (preferred but not required)



Nice to Have



• Experience working as a Virtual Assistant or Administrative Assistant

• Familiarity with project management systems such as Fergus or similar tools

• Experience with blog publishing platforms or CMS systems (WordPress or similar)

• Basic understanding of content writing or SEO

• Experience supporting service based or construction related businesses



Work Environment



You will be working closely with the operations and management team to support day to day activities across the business. This role requires someone dependable, organized, and comfortable handling both administrative and content related responsibilities.



If you enjoy helping businesses stay organized while also supporting content and marketing efforts, we would love to hear from you.

- Zero leads in 30 days ? we part ways

- Top performers earn $1,000+/month within 3 months



TO APPLY — send me:

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Community Research & Outreach Assistant (Foreign Communities in Japan)
description:
We are a licensed real estate company in Japan specializing in helping foreigners purchase affordable houses and akiya (vacant homes).



Many foreigners ask trusted community members questions about housing and living in Japan. These community members often include interpreters, visa support helpers, and people who assist foreigners with daily life in Japan.



Because of this, we work with trusted community members who may introduce people interested in buying property in Japan.



We are looking for someone who can help us research foreign communities related to Japan and connect with community leaders.



This role focuses on research and outreach, not sales.



This role is especially suitable for people who are already members of foreign communities related to Japan.



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



• Research foreign communities related to Japan on
, Instagram, and LinkedIn

• Identify people who support foreigners living in Japan (interpreters, visa support, community organizers, etc.)

• Review profiles to determine whether they match the target profile

• Send outreach messages introducing our partnership opportunity

• Track contacts and responses in a spreadsheet

• Notify the team when someone shows interest



IDEAL CANDIDATE



This role is a good fit for someone who:



• Enjoys researching online communities

• Is comfortable sending messages to new people on social media

• Can organize information and track contacts carefully

• Has experience with social media research or lead generation



Experience in the following areas is a plus:



• Social media outreach

• Lead generation

• Online research

• Community engagement



COMPENSATION



Base pay:

PHP 8,000 per month



Performance bonuses:



• PHP 200 per qualified WhatsApp lead

• PHP 4,000 per closed deal (after confirmed contract and payment)



WORK SETUP



• Fully remote

• Flexible working schedule

• Long-term opportunity



APPLICATION TASK (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please complete the following task.



Find 3
 groups related to foreigners living in Japan.

Send the group name, link, and number of members.



Find 2 people who help foreigners living in Japan (examples: interpreter, visa support, community organizer).



For each person include:



• Profile link

• What service they provide

• Why you believe they receive questions from foreigners



Important:

Please send individual people, not company pages.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION



Start your application message with:



“I enjoy community research.”



Applications without this sentence will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Time Direct Response Copywriter & AI Prompt Engineer
description:
We are an offer publishing group launching multiple digital products. 



Our mission: To turn every Filipino's default state from chaos to grounded peace by making problem-solving knowledge transformational.



The Role:

We do not need a "blank-page" writer who wants to invent things from scratch. Our Founder is a high-level marketer who architects the offers, the angles, and the brand.



Your job is to be the Copy Engineer. You will take our raw frameworks, our proven templates, and our AI prompts, and translate that vision into high-converting, deployable copy.



What You Will Do:



Meta Ad Copy: Write scroll-stopping ads (we will give you the exact flow, format, and AI prompts).



Sales Pages: Assemble high-converting sales letters (using our existing templates and AI prompts).



Funnel Optimization: Write the copy for Order Bumps, OTO 1, and OTO 2 to maximize Average Order Value.



 Marketing: Write the backend money-makers (Initiate Checkout/Abandoned Cart sequences, onboarding sequences, and daily broadcast
s).



AI Image Generation: Generate on-brand AI images to pair with your copy using tools like Nano Banana, Manus, or Midjourney based on our provided prompts.



+ points if you



-help/like masterminding with the founder to solidify the brand, offer





Who You Are:



You know fundamentals of marketing not just with AI. you know the quality of copy depends on the prompt and knowledge on copywriting. (We provide the prompts so you dont start from scratch)



You are Data-Driven: You don't just write and guess. You know how to read data, split-test headlines, and track Open Rates and CTRs.



You are Ego-Free: You are comfortable working inside a system. You love leverage. You would rather use a proven prompt and a template to launch a page in 2 hours than spend 3 days agonizing over the "perfect" sentence.



You Speak Our Market: You understand the Filipino market and know how to write copy that bridges the gap between their current chaos and the peace our offers provide.

title: Network Engineer
description:
I have a relatively complicated network in an apartment building (it's complicated for me - I'm hoping it won't be complicated for you! LOL). 



I currently serve 36 apartment units with an inbound fiber 5 gig (up to 10 gig bursts). It is connected to an AT&T router which goes to a 48 port NetGear switch. From there, we hard wire access points for backhaul purposes. I have a complete network diagram and a physical map of device placement. 



Unfortunately, I'm getting rogue DHCP servers messing up the network. I need to locate where the rogue DHCP servers are coming from and filter the packets on the NetGear switch. 



I'm, also, getting some unusual network behavior which may be related to the DHCP issue or traffic issues. I will need some tools (Open Source preferred) to monitor traffic. I used to use What's Up and need something similar (of course I will ask AI for a recommendation... just identifying network vulnerabilities as you might have a tool that you are comfortable with already.



Since I have deployed about 10 access points and the vendor Plume has ended their support, I need to upgrade the network to something of higher commercial viability. I am considering AI recommendations in this regard. 



I will need help with subnetting (we are running out of IP addresses). Between the management capability of the the NetGear switch, an external network monitoring tool and a robust mesh network management console, I am hoping I can provide a great user experience. I should mention that I have a lot of iOT devices that use IP and/or Zigbee or ZWave hence the need for segmentation. We have as many as 73 WIFI and wired cameras. This is a short term project with long term possibilities. 



I am very much into AI and robotics and would love to work with someone with a passion for the field.

title: Remote Interior Designer
description:
We’re looking for a talented Remote Interior Designer to join our New York–based kitchen & bath showroom team. You’ll be responsible for translating client needs into inspiring, functional design solutions—focusing primarily on kitchens, bathrooms, tile-driven spaces, and custom cabinetry layouts. You’ll work closely with our sales and project?management teams to deliver polished presentation materials and ensure seamless execution of each project.



Key Responsibilities



Concept Development: Create mood boards, material palettes, and color schemes that align with client style and budget.



Space Planning & Documentation: Produce accurate floor plans, elevations, and layout drawings using SketchUp, AutoCAD, or Revit.



3D Visualization: Generate high?quality 3D renderings to help clients visualize finish selections, tile patterns, and overall flow.



Kitchen Cabinet Design: Develop detailed cabinet layouts, elevations, and hardware specifications using 2020 Design software.



Product Specification: Research and specify tile, stone, cabinetry, countertops, lighting, and plumbing fixtures from our catalog.



Client Collaboration: Communicate design ideas clearly via
 and video calls; incorporate feedback and revisions in a timely manner.



Presentation Materials: Assemble professional proposal decks, sample boards, and “red?line” markup drawings for sales consultations.



Cross?Team Coordination: Liaise with our in?house staff to confirm feasibility, pricing, and lead times; track revisions through to installation.



Software Proficiency:



- Advanced skills in SketchUp, AutoCAD, or Revit



- Proficient in 2020 Design software for kitchen cabinet layouts



- Adobe Photoshop and InDesign are a plus



Design Eye: Excellent sense of color, texture, and spatial planning, especially for tile and cabinetry applications.



Communication: Strong written and verbal English skills for client?facing presentations and remote collaboration.



Organization & Initiative: Able to manage multiple projects, meet deadlines, and work autonomously in a remote setting.



Preferred (Nice?to?Have)



- Experience specifying high?end plumbing fixtures (Toto, Delta, Brizo, Kohler)



- Knowledge of local U.S. building codes and tile installation standards

mber to support our finance operations.

- Experience in health, fitness, or coaching is a plus but not required

Applications without the exact subject line will not be considered. No LinkedIn DMs. Only applications sent to the

We look forward to meeting you!

title: Amazon & Walmart Product Listing Assistant (POD / Dropshipping
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Product Listing Assistant to help create and manage product listings for Amazon and Walmart Marketplace.



Our store sells a mix of print-on-demand (POD) products and dropshipping items, including apparel, home décor, accessories, and other consumer products.



This role is contract-based and suitable for individuals who already have some marketplace experience or those who are motivated to learn and grow in e-commerce.



You will help with product listing, variations, data organization, and marketplace uploads.



Responsibilities



• Create product listings for Amazon and Walmart Marketplace

• Upload products manually or using spreadsheets/templates

• Organize product details including titles, descriptions, pricing, and attributes

• Set up product variations such as size, color, or style

• Assist with bulk uploads (CSV or flat files) when needed

• Upload product images and mockups

• Review listings for accuracy and completeness

• Help troubleshoot listing issues or upload errors

• Maintain organized product data using spreadsheets



Product Types



You may work with products such as:



• Print-on-demand apparel (t-shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts)

• Mugs and drinkware

• Phone cases and accessories

• Posters and wall art

• Home décor items

• General dropshipping products



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has some experience with Amazon or Walmart Marketplace listings

• Understands basic product listing structure

• Is comfortable working with spreadsheets and product data

• Pays strong attention to detail

• Is organized and reliable

• Is willing to learn new marketplace workflows



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



• Experience with print-on-demand platforms (Printify, Printful, Gelato)

• Experience with dropshipping workflows

• Familiarity with Amazon flat files or Walmart CSV uploads

• Knowledge of product variations (size/color listings)

• Understanding of IP and trademark awareness for product listings



Project Type



This is a contract-based project.



Initial work may include 10–30 listings, with potential for ongoing projects depending on performance.



To Apply



Please include the following information in your proposal:



Your experience with Amazon or Walmart product listings



Any experience with POD or dropshipping products



Whether you have used CSV or spreadsheet uploads before



Examples of products or marketplaces you have worked with



Your hourly rate or preferred project rate



Your availability



Screening Questions



Please answer the following:



Have you created product listings on Amazon or Walmart Marketplace before?



Are you familiar with product variations (size/color/style)?



Have you worked with spreadsheet or CSV product uploads?



What types of products have you listed before?



Do you have any experience with POD or dropshipping?







To confirm that you read the full job description, please begin your proposal with:



“Marketplace Assistant”

description:

dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

(Design-Led | Part-Time | 20 hours per week | 9am-1pm GMT)



**About Us

We are a UK-based storytelling consultancy. We help SMEs define their business story in just 16 words through fast-paced workshops and a proven STORY Framework. Our work sits at the intersection of strategy, storytelling, design, and practical execution.

This role exists to bring that thinking to life through high-quality creative assets, visual storytelling, and consistent content production.



**Role Overview

This is a hands-on execution role for a design-led content creator. You will work closely with the founder to turn strategic work (case studies, workshop outputs, frameworks, content ideas) into polished, on-brand assets for both us and our clients.



For the first phase, you will work exclusively on the founder’s internal materials to learn the visual style, structure and storytelling approach. Once aligned, you will gradually begin supporting client-facing projects.



This is not a strategy or decision-making role. It is ideal for someone who enjoys transforming ideas into finished creative work and maintaining consistent brand execution.





**Core Responsibility

Take one core input and multiply it into multiple high-quality outputs.

Example:

One case study ?

• 3 LinkedIn carousels

• 5 single-image posts

• 1 short reel or animated graphic

• A branded PDF version

• Supporting visuals for website or outreach



**Key Tasks & Responsibilities



1. Content Design & Production

• Design LinkedIn single-image posts and multi-slide carousels

• Create graphics, templates, and branded assets in Canva

• Produce simple social animations and lightweight video content

• Design content layouts for storytelling packages (e.g., 50 short videos, 100+ photos, narrative-led visuals)

• Resize, export, and format assets correctly for web and social channels



2. Brand Implementation & Style Consistency

• Apply brand guidelines accurately (fonts, colour systems, layout)

• Refresh and modernise existing brand materials where needed

• Maintain consistency across all digital touchpoints

• Adapt the Halekorero style to different client brands once trained



3. Templates & Systems

• Build and maintain Canva templates for:

– Social media posts

– Carousels

– Case studies

– Client-ready PDFs

• Update templates to be reusable, efficient and easy to modify

• Ensure all content libraries and asset folders are clearly named and organised



4. Content Repurposing & Storytelling Execution

• Turn long-form inputs (case studies, workshops, notes) into short-form content

• Transform rough inputs into clean, polished layouts

• Format written case studies into branded PDFs

• Create 1–2 page branded PDFs for sales, lead magnets or outreach

• Support “story pack” creation:

– Vertical short videos

– Branded photo sets

– Social-ready visual assets



5. Workshop & Toolkit Support

• Prepare slides, worksheets and supporting documents

• Format workshop outputs into client-ready deliverables

• Maintain and update templates, toolkit files and presentation materials



6. Collaboration & Growth

• Work closely with James to learn his preferred design style and narrative approach

• Trial all design work internally before progressing to client work

• Provide creative input while respecting established brand guidelines

• Progress into a long-term creative support role as trust and alignment grow



**What This Role Does Not Include

• Strategy, messaging or brand positioning decisions

• Tone of voice creation

• Client workshops or meetings

• Client relationship management

All creative direction and strategic inputs are provided.



**Skills & Experience



*Essential

• Strong Canva proficiency (templates, animations, organisation)

• Excellent attention to detail and consistency

• Ability to turn rough inputs into polished assets

• Strong visual taste and storytelling instincts

• Comfortable working from templates and brand guidelines

• Reliable and able to work independently after training

• Ability to work 20 hours per week (typically 9am–1pm GMT)



*Nice to Have

• Familiarity with LinkedIn content formats

• Basic short-form video editing or animation

• Experience supporting consultants, agencies or brand strategists

• Understanding of modern brand identity systems

• Confidence adapting styles for multiple industries



**Ideal Candidate Profile

• Creative, adaptive and a fast learner

• Enjoys structured workflows and behind-the-scenes execution

• Junior to mid-level designer with a clean, modern portfolio

• Takes pride in producing consistent, aesthetically strong work

• Comfortable receiving direction and iterating quickly

• Reliable, trustworthy and organised



**Working Arrangement

• Part-time, remote (20 hours/week)

• Paid monthly

• Reporting directly to the founder

• Initial focus on internal branding and content

• Gradual progression into client projects once aligned

• May involve test tasks for client work

• Long-term embedded support role



**Success Indicators

• Strong stylistic alignment with the founder’s visual approach

• High-quality creative output delivered consistently

• Ability to turn strategic ideas into refined, usable assets

• Reliable communication and speed of delivery

• Clear improvement in the efficiency of content production

• Successful internal phase followed by smooth transition to client work



**How to apply

Please fill out this form:

Note: Sending only a message here without completing the form will NOT be considered.



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Meta CAPI Shopify Developer
description:
We're a social media advertising agency working with e-commerce brands mostly in the US.



We need a developer to own our Conversions API integration end-to-end — setup, deduplication, event quality, and ongoing maintenance. This is not a "turn on the 
 channel" role. We need someone who genuinely understands server-side tracking.



What you'll do

—Set up Meta CAPI via server-side integration on Shopify (not just the native app)

—Implement proper deduplication between browser Pixel and server CAPI events

—Pass all key customer parameters 
, phone, FBP, FBC, IP, user agent) to maximize EMQ scores

—Track and verify the full purchase funnel: PageView ? ViewContent ? AddToCart ? InitiateCheckout ? Purchase

—Audit existing setup for issues and provide ongoing monitoring as Meta's API evolves



Requirements

—Fluency in English (non-negotiable)

—Proven hands-on CAPI experience — not just the 
 channel plugin

— Solid grasp of event deduplication using event_id matching

— Server-side coding ability in Node.js, Python, or PHP to send events via Meta Graph API

—Comfortable with Shopify webhooks, theme dev, and the Admin API



To apply — answer these in your cover letter. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



Q1. Describe a CAPI implementation you did on Shopify. What was the EMQ score before and after?

Q2. How do you handle deduplication between the browser Pixel and server CAPI? Walk us through your approach.

Q3. What's your availability (hrs/week) and timezone?
