title: CONVERSION RATE OPTIMIZATION (CRO) SPECIALIST — E-COMMERCE OPERATIONS | APEX VELOCITY
description:
Company: Apex Velocity

Type: Gig / Project-Based (Possible Long-Term Work)



We are looking for a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to help us improve the performance and conversion rates of Shopify stores for client projects.



This is a gig-based role, but strong performers may receive ongoing work and future projects with our team.



What You'll Be Doing

Tasks may vary depending on the project, but typically include:

• Analyzing Shopify store performance and identifying opportunities to improve conversions

 • Optimizing product pages, landing pages, and checkout flow

 • Running or planning A/B tests to improve user experience and sales

 • Reviewing analytics data to understand user behavior and drop-off points

 • Using heatmaps and session recordings to identify friction in the customer journey

 • Recommending UX and layout improvements to increase conversions

 • Collaborating with developers and the operations team to implement optimizations



Requirements

• Experience with conversion rate optimization for e-commerce stores

• Familiar with Shopify store structure and customer journeys

• Comfortable analyzing analytics data and user behavior

• Experience with A/B testing tools

• Familiar with heatmap or session recording tools (Hotjar, Microsoft Clarity, etc.)

• Understanding of conversion psychology and UX design

• Able to identify friction points and recommend improvements

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Good communication and reliable with deadlines



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

• Experience optimizing Shopify stores specifically

• Experience with landing page builders like PageFly or GemPages



Gig Details

• Project-based work

 • Flexible schedule (as long as tasks are completed on time)

 • Opportunity for consistent gigs and long-term collaboration



How to Apply



Start your application with the phrase "Ready to optimize" so we know you read the post.

Then include:

• Your CRO or optimization experience

 • Examples of stores or pages you've optimized (if available)

 • The tools and analytics platforms you use



If you’re a strong fit, we may also consider you for ongoing CRO projects with our team.

title: Social Media Manager (SMM) – AI & Short-Form Content Execution Focus
description:
OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Social Media Manager to run and grow AI-themed social media

pages focused on trending artificial intelligence news, tools, and updates.



This role is execution-focused. You will monitor AI news sources, tech publications,

hashtags, and competing AI theme pages daily. Your job is to identify high-performing or

trending topics, verify information using original sources, and transform those topics into

optimized short-form content using AI tools and strong visual design.



You must be highly organized, fast-moving, and comfortable using ChatGPT and other

AI tools to restructure and improve content—not just copy it. Strong Canva and CapCut

skills are non-negotiable.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Monitor AI news daily (e.g., major tech publications such as TechCrunch, official

company blogs, product launch announcements, etc.)

2. Track trending AI hashtags, viral posts, and competing AI theme pages across

TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and X

3. Identify high-performing topics early and turn them into optimized content quickly

4. Verify claims using original sources before publishing

5. Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to:

-  Check accuracy of trending posts

- Improve hooks and structure

- Generate carousel outlines (e.g., 8–10 slides)

- Refine captions for engagement

6. Create branded carousel posts using Canva

7. Edit short-form videos using CapCut for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

8. Repurpose content across platforms while maintaining consistent branding

9. Maintain a consistent daily posting schedule

10. Track basic analytics (views, saves, shares, watch time) and identify patterns

11. Continuously improve formatting, hooks, and storytelling to increase engagement



REQUIREMENTS:

- Advanced Canva and CapCut skills (must be clear in portfolio)

- Strong understanding of short-form content structure (hooks, pacing, retention)

- Ability to monitor multiple AI news sources and theme pages daily

- Ability to quickly summarize and simplify tech/AI news

- Strong ChatGPT prompting skills (editing, restructuring, improving clarity and

engagement)

- Ability to fact-check information using primary sources

- Fast turnaround time and ability to produce content consistently

- Organized workflow and ability to follow brand guidelines

- Strong English writing skills



TO APPLY, PLEASE PROVIDE US WITH YOUR:

1. Latest Resume & Portfolio

2. A 30–60 second video introducing yourself and explaining why you’re a good fit for the role

3. Carousel Post (Any AI news related) minimum of 4 slides

Please note that your carousel submission will not be posted anywhere, as it is strictly part of our application process only.

title: TikTok Shop Manager -Long Term Role
description:
TikTok Shop Growth Manager (Merch Brand)



We are launching a new TikTok Shop for a merchandise brand and are looking for someone with proven TikTok Shop experience. You must truly understand TikTok Shop Seller Center and TikTok commerce.



This is not a basic VA role. If you do not have experience and knowledge in the TikTok Shop Seller Center. Please do not apply.



We need someone who understands how to turn TikTok traffic into product sales.



If you know how TikTok buyers behave, how to position products, and how to manage listings inside TikTok Shop properly, this role may be a great fit.



This is a long-term position, not a short freelance project.



Responsibilities



• Manage TikTok Shop Seller Center

• Create and optimize product listings

• Write compelling product titles and descriptions

• Select correct categories, attributes, and pricing

• Connect products to TikTok content

• Manage Printify merchandise listings

• Launch and monitor TikTok ads

• Monitor performance and improve conversion



What We're Looking For



• Hands-on experience with TikTok Shop Seller Center

• Experience working with merch or apparel products

• Experience running TikTok ads

• Strong writing skills for product titles and descriptions

• Attention to detail with pricing, categories, and product data



You should understand why someone would buy the product, not just upload listings.



Important



This is a new TikTok Shop launch, and we are specifically looking for someone with real hands-on TikTok Shop experience.



If you have only watched tutorials or are relying on ChatGPT to figure out TikTok Shop, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who has actually worked inside TikTok Shop Seller Center and understands how the platform works.



How to Apply



Start your application with:



TikTok Shop Growth Pro



Then include:



Your experience working inside TikTok Shop Seller Center



A TikTok Shop store or listing you have worked on



One TikTok Shop problem you solved and how you fixed it



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Position Details



Long-term role



Hourly rate based on experience

title: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator

Work From Home | Full-Time | Immediate Start



Start immediately and work full-time from home!



Position Overview:



We are seeking an experienced Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator with strong medical administrative skills to support our medical Referral Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the end-to-end referral process, ensuring accurate coordination between providers, insurance companies, and patients to facilitate timely access to care.



Key Responsibilities:



1.Process and manage incoming and outgoing medical referrals from initiation to completion



2.Coordinate referrals between primary care providers, specialists, and facilities



3.Verify insurance eligibility and referral requirements



4.Obtain authorizations when required for referred services



5.Follow up on pending referrals and approvals to prevent delays in patient care



6.Communicate with insurance companies, provider offices, and patients regarding referral status



7.Accurately document referral information and outcomes in the EMR/EHR system



8.Handle inbound and outbound calls professionally



9.Respond to patient and provider inquiries related to referrals



Requirements:



1.Must be a Nurse Graduate



2.Minimum 2 years of experience in a Referral Department, Referral Coordination, or similar medical administrative role



3.Strong understanding of medical terminology



4.Experience working with EMR/EHR systems (e.g., ECW or similar platforms)



5.Experience with insurance verification, referral eligibility, and payer communication



6.Experience handling patient and provider calls professionally



7.Fluent in English, both spoken and written



8.Available to start immediately



9.Must have own computer/laptop, stable internet connection, noise-canceling headset, and backup equipment



10.Confident in handling inbound and outbound calls

title: Professional QA Engineer (Remote)
description:
Professional QA Engineer (Web/App)



We are looking for a talented QA (Quality Assurance) Engineer to join our team and help ensure the quality, reliability, and usability of our web-based e-commerce platform.



Our application enables users to buy gift cards, earn cashback, and access engaging digital experiences. This is a key role where you will help guarantee stable, intuitive, and high-quality product releases, directly impacting how customers experience our platform.



You will work closely with developers, designers, and product teams to validate functionality, improve testing processes, and represent the end-user perspective throughout the development lifecycle.



Key Responsibilities



Analyse end-user requirements and define comprehensive test plans.



Execute test cases, identify defects, and propose improvements.



Debug issues, document findings clearly, and follow up until resolution.



Generate reports on test results, defects, and quality metrics.



Define testing priorities aligned with system requirements and release cycles.



Document system functionalities and expected behaviours.



Represent the end-user perspective to ensure requirements are correctly implemented.



Identify opportunities to improve QA processes and the software development lifecycle.



Requirements



3+ years of experience testing web-based applications.



Strong knowledge of testing methodologies and QA tools.



Experience creating test plans, writing test cases, and debugging issues.



Good understanding of web technologies (frontend and backend basics).



Experience testing mobile applications is a plus.



Familiarity with cross-browser and cross-device testing tools (e.g., BrowserStack) is a plus.



Good English communication skills, particularly for writing clear documentation and test reports.



Why Join Us



Remote-friendly – collaborate from anywhere.



Impactful role – ensure product quality across critical user journeys.



Modern tech stack – work with web technologies, modern testing tools, and AWS-based cloud platforms.



Growing business – be part of a scaling platform shaping the digital gift card market.



Important Application Requirements



Please apply only if you are interested in working exclusively with our team and are serious about this position.



To be considered, your application must include:



A short note explaining why you are interested in this role.



Your monthly salary expectation.



The number of hours per week you are able to dedicate to this position.



Applications missing this information will not be considered.

title: PERSONAL ASSISTANT – WORK DIRECTLY WITH THE FOUNDER (IMMEDIATE START TODAY)
description:
PERSONAL ASSISTANT – WORK DIRECTLY WITH THE FOUNDER (IMMEDIATE START TODAY)



Location: Remote

Hours: 6–8 hours per day (full-time)

Starting Pay: $300 per month

Status: Hiring Right Now – Immediate Start Today (subject to video pass test (reminder must be done on day of applying)



The Opportunity

This is a rare chance to work directly with the founder of an established and well-reviewed e-commerce brand. You will help manage major global product listings seen by hundreds of thousands of customers each month. We already have a VA team, but this role is special – you will work side-by-side with the founder, learning real-world skills that can turn into a long-term career.



Who We’re Looking For

We’re looking for someone fresh, motivated, and hungry to learn – ideally a recent graduate or someone early in their career who’s ready to grow. You don’t need years of experience, but you do need the right attitude: driven, disciplined, and committed.



Requirements



Video Requirement – We only accept new videos recorded today (the same date you apply). Start your video by saying today’s date out loud, then show your face and workstation clearly. Keep it 2-5 mins but make it genuine and filmed specifically for this role. Applications that reuse older videos or skip this step will be automatically rejected.



Excel Skills – You must have basic Excel or Google Sheets skills and be comfortable working with data.



Availability – Must be able to start immediately and commit to 7 days of project work this week. If you prove yourself during this first week, the role continues into a full-time position with ongoing training, regalua pay reviews, and career progression.



Communication – Clear written English, attention to detail, and a calm, professional tone in messages and reports.



Working Hours – No graveyard shift required. We fully understand Philippine working hours and will accommodate a healthy, schedule probably you will finish by 10pm or 11pm and start later in the day



Pay & Growth

$300 per month during the initial learning phase (6–8 hours per day). Paid as a tea
mber, not hourly. Long-term full-time position with yearly salary progression and career development once proven. You will be mentored directly by the founder and gain exposure to international e-commerce operations.



About Us

We’re an established e-commerce business with over 20 years of trading history and a strong online reputation. You don’t need to know everything about us right now – once shortlisted, you will quickly see we’re a respected, well-known brand with products sold worldwide.



Why This Role Is Special

This isn’t just another VA position. It’s a chance to learn how a global brand is built and managed from the inside – directly with someone well-known in the e-commerce space and with years of experience and success. You’ll gain first-hand exposure and mentorship that can fast-track your own growth. If you understand what it takes to be a rock-star assistant – proactive, organised, and reliable – you’ll grow faster than you ever imagined.



How to Apply

Send the following:



Your short video (introduce yourself, say today’s date, and show your workstation)



Your résumé or a short summary of your background



Confirmation that you can start this week and work full time

Availability – Must be able to start immediately and commit to 7 days of project work this week. If you prove yourself during this first week, the role continues into a full-time position with ongoing training, regalua pay reviews, and career progression.



Communication – Clear written English, attention to detail, and a calm, professional tone in messages and reports.



Working Hours – No graveyard shift required. We fully understand Philippine working hours and will accommodate a healthy, schedule probably you will finish by 10pm or 11pm and start later in the day



Pay & Growth

$300 per month during the initial learning phase (6–8 hours per day). Paid as a tea
mber, not hourly. Long-term full-time position with yearly salary progression and career development once proven. You will be mentored directly by the founder and gain exposure to international e-commerce operations.



About Us

We’re an established e-commerce business with over 20 years of trading history and a strong online reputation. You don’t need to know everything about us right now – once shortlisted, you will quickly see we’re a respected, well-known brand with products sold worldwide.



Why This Role Is Special

This isn’t just another VA position. It’s a chance to learn how a global brand is built and managed from the inside – directly with someone well-known in the e-commerce space and with years of experience and success. You’ll gain first-hand exposure and mentorship that can fast-track your own growth. If you understand what it takes to be a rock-star assistant – proactive, organised, and reliable – you’ll grow faster than you ever imagined.



How to Apply

Send the following:



Your short video (introduce yourself, say today’s date, and show your workstation)



Your résumé or a short summary of your background



Confirmation that you can start this week and work full time

title: VSL Producer – Direct Response Video Specialist (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
VSL Producer – Direct Response Video Specialist (Full-Time, Remote)

Company: Fast-Growing European D2C Brand (Health & Wellness)



About Us

We are a fast-scaling direct-to-consumer health & wellness brand running paid media across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Scandinavia. Our primary acquisition channel is Meta — and our primary creative weapon is the VSL.

We don't need a video editor who "also does VSLs."

We need someone who thinks in VSLs.



The Role

You will own VSL production end-to-end. From script brief to final export — you turn our direct-response copy into high-converting video sales letters that run on Meta and scale.

You understand Eugene Schwartz's stages of market sophistication. You know why the first 3 seconds either make or break a $10,000/day ad spend. You've watched enough winning VSLs to recognize a strong hook pattern before the voiceover even finishes.

This is a performance role. Your output is measured in ROAS, not views.



What You'll Be Producing



Long-form VSLs (8–20 min): Authority-driven, problem-agitate-solve structured video ads with AI voiceovers, AI avatars, B-roll, and animated overlays

Short-form VSLs (2–4 min): Punchy, hook-first Meta feed and Reels variants

Hook libraries: 5–10 cold open variations per VSL for systematic A/B testing

VSL cutdowns: Reformatted 30/60s versions from winning long-form VSLs

Advertorial-style video: Scrollable "news article" format videos for pre-lander traffic





You Know Exactly What We Mean By:



Problem-agitate-solve structure

Open loop hooks and curiosity gaps

Pattern interrupt at the 30-second mark

Social proof stacking

Objection handling before the CTA

False close and re-open

Urgency stack at the end



If you had to Google any of those terms — this role isn't for you.



Technical Requirements



2+ years producing VSLs specifically for DTC health, wellness, or info product brands

Proficient in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Hands-on with AI avatar tools: HeyGen, Synthesia, D-ID, or similar

AI voiceover experience: ElevenLabs, PlayHT, or similar

Able to source and cut B-roll, stock footage, and overlays independently

Comfortable receiving a script + brief and delivering a publish-ready VSL

Able to produce 3–5 complete VSL variants per week

Fluent in written English

Reliable internet and own equipment



Bonus if you have:



Experience with Pictory, Descript, or similar AI-assisted editing tools

Knowledge of subtitle/caption styling for Meta (burned-in, animated)

Experience editing for European health/wellness brands





This Role Is NOT For You If:



You've never produced a VSL longer than 5 minutes

You edit for aesthetics first and conversion second

You need a creative director to guide every decision

You've never tracked whether your video actually converted

You're looking for creative freedom without performance accountability





What We Offer



Full-time, stable long-term position

Work directly with the founder — zero bureaucracy

Performance bonuses tied to winning VSLs (we track ROAS per creative)

Access to all paid tools and subscriptions

Ongoing VSL briefs with structured scripts — you focus on production, not ideation

A brand that is actively scaling — your best work will run at serious budget





How to Apply

We only review applications submitted via our Typeform. Copy and paste the link below (remove spaces):

form .typeform. com/to/ dO9pZYvu

Only completed applications are reviewed.

Takes under 8 minutes — we respond within 3–5 business days.

title: Direct Response Video Editor – Sales Copy & VSL (Full-Time, Remote)

The Role

You started with words — copy, scripts, sales pages — and somewhere along the way you discovered that video was just direct response with a play button. Now you edit with a copywriter's brain: every cut serves the argument, every B-roll clip reinforces the hook, every pacing decision moves the viewer closer to the CTA.That's exactly who we're looking for.You'll take our briefs and scripts and turn them into VSLs that convert cold traffic on Meta. You'll work directly with the founder, iterate fast based on performance data, and own creative output from first frame to final export.What You'll Be Producing

ntum at minute three. You've read enough Ogilvy, Halbert, or Schwartz to know that great video ads are great sales letters first.You understand:



Why curiosity gaps keep viewers watching

How to structure a problem-agitate-solve arc visually

When to slow down and when to punch through

How B-roll either supports or undermines the copy beneath it



Requirements

2+ years editing direct-response video ads or VSLs for DTC or info product brands

Strong understanding of sales copy structure and direct-response principles

Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Experience with AI voiceover tools: ElevenLabs, PlayHT, or similar

Produces 3–5 polished VSL variants per week

Fluent written English

Reliable internet and own equipment

You've written copy yourself — scripts,
s, landing pages

Knowledge of Meta ad creative best practices

This Role Is NOT For You If:

You wait for detailed frame-by-frame direction before starting

You don't read the script before you open the timeline

You've never thought about why a video did or didn't convert



What We Offer

Direct access to the founder — no layers, no bottlenecks

Performance bonuses tied to winning creatives

Structured briefs and scripts — you focus on execution

Access to all paid tools and subscriptions



A brand actively scaling across Europe — your work runs at real budget

title: Performance Video Specialist – Meta Ads & VSL (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-scaling direct-to-consumer health & wellness brand running Meta campaigns across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Scandinavia. We spend serious money on paid social — and we need creative that earns it back.

We don't separate marketing from creative.

The best video ads are made by people who understand both.



The Role

You think in ROAS. You've watched enough Meta ad accounts to know that creative is the primary lever — not targeting, not budget, not bidding strategy. You understand that a bad hook kills an ad in 2 seconds flat, and that the difference between a 1.5x and a 3x ROAS is often one sentence in the opening frame.

You can edit video — but more importantly, you can evaluate video. You know when an ad will work before it runs. You've seen enough winning and losing creatives to have pattern recognition, and you use that to build better assets every week.

You'll work directly with the founder, own our video creative output, and be a key voice in which concepts get produced and which get killed.



What You'll Be Producing



VSLs for Meta: Conversion-focused video sales letters optimized for cold traffic on
 and Instagram

Short-form creatives: Hook-first 30–90 second ads for Reels, Stories, and Feed

Creative iterations: Fast variations of winning ads — new hooks, new CTAs, new angles

UGC and testimonial videos: Social proof assets built from raw footage or AI-generated content

Performance reports: Basic weekly feedback on which creatives are pulling and why





What You Understand Without Being Told



Hook strength is the most important variable in any video ad

Cold traffic and warm traffic need completely different creative

The comment section tells you more about creative quality than any dashboard

Fatigue is inevitable — volume and variation are the answer

A 4% CTR with a 1.5 ROAS is worse than a 1.5% CTR with a 3.5 ROAS





Requirements



2+ years working with video creative for Meta 
 & Instagram) paid campaigns

Hands-on experience producing or editing VSLs or direct-response video ads

Strong understanding of Meta ad creative best practices and performance metrics

Experience using AI tools for video production (avatars, voiceovers, B-roll generation)

Proficient in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar editing software

Able to produce and iterate on 8–12 creatives per week

Comfortable discussing creative performance with data — CTR, hook rate, ROAS, CPP

Fluent written English

Reliable internet and own equipment



Bonus:



Experience managing or closely supporting Meta ad accounts

Familiarity with creative testing frameworks (ABO, CBO, holdout tests)

Background in DTC health, wellness, or supplement brands





This Role Is NOT For You If:



You've only edited video without ever looking at whether it converted

You're uncomfortable being evaluated on performance metrics

You separate "the creative side" from "the marketing side" in your mind

You've never produced a VSL or direct-response video ad

You prefer brand content and storytelling over direct-response and conversion





What We Offer



Full-time remote position with direct access to the founder

Front-row seat to a scaling European D2C brand — see exactly how spend, creative, and ROAS interact

Performance bonuses on winning creatives — your best work is rewarded directly

Access to all paid tools and subscriptions

Real creative ownership and influence over which concepts get produced

Long-term growth opportunity as the brand scales across new markets and products





How to Apply

form .typeform. com/to/ dO9pZYvu

Excellent English communication (if you can't write a clear brief that an editor can execute without 10 follow-up questions, don't apply)



Fill in this form to apply: (we go trough all submissions)

title: Junior Media Buyer
description:
We are looking for a data-driven and performance-oriented Junior Media Buyer to join our growing team.



This role is ideal for someone with hands-on media buying experience who understands campaign structure, optimization logic, and performance analysis — not just data entry.



If you have experience in search arbitrage environments, that is a strong advantage.





? Requirements



1+ year hands-on experience in Media Buying (Meta required)



Experience in Search Arbitrage is a strong plus



Solid understanding of:



Campaign structure (CBO/ABO)



Creative testing frameworks



Optimization, scaling strategies



Strong analytical mindset — comfortable working with performance metrics daily



Experience working with:



Google Sheets (formulas, data analysis, reporting)



Performance dashboards



Understanding of ROI, ROAS, EPC, CPA optimization logic



Ability to interpret performance data and make decisions independently



High attention to detail



Strong time management and ability to handle multiple campaigns simultaneously



Fast execution speed without sacrificing accuracy



Experience with automation rules





???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



Launch, manage, and optimize paid traffic campaigns (Meta primarily)



Execute structured testing across creatives, angles, and GEOs



Monitor KPIs daily (CTR, CPC, EPC, CPA, ROAS) and make optimization decisions



Identify performance drops and troubleshoot root causes (creative fatigue, EPC decline, GEO saturation, etc.)



Analyze data and provide actionable insights to Team Lead



Scale profitable campaigns using structured scaling frameworks



Maintain daily reporting



Assist with automation rules and performance-based scaling logic



Collaborate with creative team





What we offer:



- Opportunities for professional development and personal growth ????



- Competitive salary, reasonable and fair working conditions ????



- A ridiculously awesome team and work environment ????



- Training opportunities, including paid courses and webinars ????



- Remote working conditions ????



- Generous PTO and Holidays ????



Join us and let's make some social media magic happen! Apply now!

About Us



Ylopo, LLC is a rapidly growing marketing and technology company providing internet marketing services and proprietary lead generation and engagement software to successful real estate agents across the country. We are seeking an outgoing, tech savvy individual to join our growing team.



 



Why work for Ylopo?



At Ylopo we offer tea
mbers:



a commitment to personal development,

team building events, team lunches/ happy hours, and other company wide events



a supportive, caring environment dedicated to continuous learning and growth.



Ylopo is looking for our next superstar Business Development Representative. We have more leads than we can handle with our current small sales team and we’re looking to find a new tea
mber who can confidently and diligently turn qualified inbound opportunities into happy customers.

s, and online inquiries)

Rate: Php 50,000 plus variable commission



MAGIC WORD: YLOPER

title: IS YOUR GHL AUTOMATION WORK TOO GOOD FOR YOUR CURRENT TEAM?
description:
You're the one who stays curious when something breaks instead of panicking. You've built workflows that run so cleanly nobody even knows you touched them. You think in systems. You see the connection between steps that other people miss entirely. You don't need someone hovering over your shoulder telling you what to do next — you already know. And if we're being honest, you've probably been doing work that's a little too good for wherever you're doing it right now.

If that sounds like you, keep reading.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

This role is for someone who genuinely enjoys the puzzle. Not someone who tolerates automation work to collect a paycheck — someone who gets a little excited when a workflow finally clicks into place the way it's supposed to.



You should be fluent in GoHighLevel. Not just familiar. Fluent. You've built complex workflows, worked with webhooks and APIs, and you know how automations affect each other inside a live system.



You write clean SOPs. You can record a Loom that actually makes sense. When something doesn't work, you dig in instead of waiting for someone to tell you what to try next.



This role is not for people who need constant hand-holding, freeze when something breaks, or talk more than they build.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Most of your day lives inside GoHighLevel across a growing set of client accounts. Here's what that looks like:



- Creating and managing GHL workflows

- Building AI-assisted follow-up and conversational automation systems

- Setting up appointment and lead workflows

- Working with webhooks, APIs, and custom values

- Improving automations as we learn what works

- Writing SOPs and recording Loom walkthroughs so the team can use and build on what you create



It also helps to be comfortable with tools like n8n, Make, Zapier, Airtable, or WordPress. But GHL is the core of this role.

A lot of what we build has AI woven into it — follow-up sequences, conversation automation, prompt logic inside workflows. You don't need to be on the bleeding edge, but you should be comfortable working with AI as part of the system.



WHO WE ARE

We're a small, tight-knit crew. Selective about who we bring in. We move fast, communicate clearly, and take our work seriously without taking ourselves too seriously.



The person who joins us won't be a cog. You'll be part of building something. We currently support about five major clients with ongoing automation work and we're also building a SaaS onboarding and automation system — which means the systems are growing and so is the opportunity.



The right person here has a path to growing into our Automation Lead as the team expands.



ABOUT VENTIN MEDIA

Ventin Media helps businesses grow through structured automation and real infrastructure. We don't chase trends. We build infrastructure.



Instead of jumping on whatever marketing tool is hot right now, we build systems that actually work and keep working. Automation is how we do that — for our clients and for ourselves.



WORK SETUP

Full-time remote with a flexible schedule. We overlap with U.S. Central Time for two tea
etings per week. No micromanagement. Just results.



Starting pay is $800 USD per month during a 3-month probation period. After that, compensation grows with your performance and responsibility. We also provide 13th month pay toward the end of the year.

This is a long-term role. We're not hiring for a project — we're hiring for a seat on the team.



EQUIPMENT

Please include in your application:



- Your computer specs

- Your primary internet connection

- Your backup internet connection (if applicable)



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph only. Anyone who reaches out outside the platform will not be considered.

Include written answers to these three questions:



1. Describe a complex GoHighLevel automation you built and what problem it solved.

2. Have you used webhooks or APIs in your automations? If so, how?

3. If you were given an automation that worked but could be improved, how would you approach optimizing it?



Also include a 5 to 10 minute Loom video walking through an automation you built. Show the logic. Explain your thinking.

That video tells us more than your resume ever will.

title: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist – Landing Pages & UX
description:
We are looking for a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist with strong design skills to help improve the performance of our website and subscription flows. The main focus of this role is optimizing subscription cancellation flows, landing pages, and user experience to increase retention and conversions.



You will analyze how users interact with our pages and design improvements that reduce friction, improve layout, and encourage customers to stay subscribed.



Responsibilities

    •    Improve and design high-converting landing pages and retention flows

    •    Optimize subscription cancellation flows to increase customer retention

    •    Create conversion-focused page designs and layouts

    •    Identify UX issues and implement improvements based on data and testing

    •    Work with our team to continuously test and improve conversion performance



Requirements

    •    Experience with CRO, UX/UI design, or landing page optimization

    •    Strong understanding of conversion-focused design

    •    Experience with Shopify, Replo, or similar page builders

    •    Ability to design pages that improve retention and conversion rates

title: Office Assistant & Social Media/Content Manager
description:
Exceptional Caregivers Solutions (ECS)



Office Assistant & Social Media/Content Manager



Location: Virtual Position Type: Full-Time Reports To: Founder & Executive Director



 About Exceptional Caregivers Solutions

Exceptional Caregivers Solutions (ECS) is a mission. driven organization dedicated to empowering families of children and young adults with disabilities, autism, and complex needs. We create inclusive events, resource networks, and educational tools that help caregivers feel supported, informed, and connected. Our team is small, passionate, and deeply committed to making a real difference in families' lives.

Are we seeking a highly skilled tech, Savvy, creative, and organized Office Assistant & Social Media/Content Manager who can support daily operations while elevating our digital presence and outreach.



POSITION SUMMARY

This role combines administrative support, digital content creation, social media management, and AI-powered automation. The ideal candidate is proactive and detail-oriented, creative, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment. You must be able to manage multiple platforms, tools, and tasks while maintaining a warm, professional, caregiver-centered tone in all communications.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 Administrative & Office Support

 • Assist with daily administrative tasks, scheduling,
 management, and document organization

 • Support event planning, provider coordination, and resource distribution

 • Maintain digital files, contracts, and organizational documents

 • Assist with onboarding service providers, partners, and volunteers

 • Support business operations, including understanding basic business structure, agreements, and contracts

Social Media & Digital Presence Management

 • Manage and grow ECS presence across all major social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, etc.)

 • Create, schedule, and manage posts using GoHighLevel and other scheduling tools

 • Respond to comments, messages, and community engagement

 • Track analytics and adjust strategy to increase reach and engagement

 • Maintain brand voice that is supportive, inclusive, and caregiver-centered

 Content Creation & Marketing

 • Create high-quality graphics, flyers, presentations, and marketing materials using Canva and Microsoft Office

 • Produce short-form videos, educational content, reels, and promotional clips using AI tools

 • Write captions, scripts,
 campaigns, and resource materials

 • Conduct market research to support content development and event planning

 • Assist in developing resource guides, handouts, and caregiver tools

Website & Technology Management

 • Manage and update the ECS website through GoDaddy or similar hosting platforms

 • Upload resources, event information, and blog content

 • Ensure website accessibility and user-friendly navigation

 • Troubleshoot basic website issues

AI & Automation Expertise (Including AI Agents)

The ideal candidate must demonstrate advanced proficiency in modern AI tools and automation systems, including the ability to set up, train, deploy, and manage AI agents to improve operational efficiency and generate content.

Required capabilities include:

 • Expertise in ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, and other leading AI platforms

 • Ability to build and manage AI agents for:

   Content creation

   Social media scheduling

    Research automation

   Customer communication workflows

   Lead nurturing and CRM automation

 • Experience integrating AI agents into GoHighLevel, websites, and marketing funnels

 • Ability to generate short?form videos, educational clips, scripts, and marketing content using AI tools

 • Ability to evaluate AI outputs for accuracy, tone, and brand alignment

 • Understanding of ethical AI use, data privacy, and responsible automation practices

Webinars & Virtual Events

 • Assist with planning, hosting, and moderating webinars

 • Manage Zoom/virtual platforms, chat, Q&A, and tech support

 • Create slide decks, scripts, and promotional materials

 • Support live engagement and follow-up communication

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

 • Proven experience managing social media for a business or organization

 • Demonstrated content creation portfolio (graphics, videos, reels, etc.)

 • Proficiency in:

  Canva

  HighLevel

  Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint

  Google Sheets & Google Workspace

  GoDaddy or similar website platforms

 • Strong writing, communication, and storytelling skills

 • Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

 • Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

 • Comfort working with families of children with disabilities (experience preferred but not required)



BONUS SKILLS (Highly Valued)

 • Experience in a nonprofit or family support organization

 • Knowledge of early intervention, disability services, or caregiver support

 • Photography or videography skills

 • Experience with CRM systems

 • Event planning experience

PERSONAL QUALITIES

We’re looking for someone who is:

 • Compassionate and mission?driven

 • Creative and resourceful

 • Tech savvy and eager to learn

 • Organized and reliable

 • Comfortable working with sensitive family topics

 • Able to maintain confidentiality and professionalism

 • Passionate about supporting caregivers and building community

HOW TO APPLY

Applicants must submit:

 • Resume

 • Portfolio or examples of content (graphics, videos, posts, etc.)

 • A short video (2–3 minutes) answering the following:

   What makes you a strong candidate for this position?

   Why do you want to be part of a movement supporting families of children and young adults with disabilities and special needs?

  What unique talents, skills, or experiences can you bring to ECS to help us expand our impact?

 • A brief written statement on why you want to support families and caregivers

• Green screen editing

???? Important

This role requires 100% exclusivity. You cannot work with other clients or companies while working with us.



6?? Your expected monthly salary



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast



• reliable



• detail-oriented



• experienced with ad editing



• serious about long-term work



If this sounds like you, apply with the details requested above.

title: Customer Support Chat Assistant (Remote)
description:

title: Ecommerce Video Editor (Facebook Ads) – AI + UGC Style Videos – Project Based (Potential Long-Term)
description:
-About Us-

We are an eCommerce brand selling sock shoes for toddlers in the U.S. market.

Our brand focuses on creating high-converting
 video ads that help parents discover comfortable, safe, and easy-to-wear shoes for their children.

Website:



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor specialized in eCommerce advertising to help create high-converting video ads.

This is currently a project-based role, but if the collaboration goes well, it can expand into a long-term position with ongoing work.



-Project Scope-

We need 9
 ad videos created for this project.

For each video:

• Script will be provided

• Competitor reference videos will be provided

• Some B-roll footage will be provided

• Additional B-roll content will need to be created using AI tools

Each video is allocated 6 hours of work.

Project Total:

9 videos × 6 hours = 54 hours total

Hourly rate: $4 per hour

Total project value: $216



-Responsibilities-

Your role will include:

• Editing short-form
 ad videos for 

• Following provided scripts and ad structure

• Using competitor ads as references for pacing, hooks and storytelling

• Creating AI generated B-roll footage

• Integrating voiceover narration

• Adding background sound or music

• Creating high-engagement subtitles

• Building the final ad video ready to run on
 ads



-B-Roll Creation-

Some B-roll will be provided.

Additional B-roll must be created using AI tools.

Examples:

• Changing faces of people in the footage

• Changing clothing

• Changing environments / surroundings

• Generating B-roll between scenes

• Matching a start image and end image to create AI motion footage



These B-rolls will be used to support the story of the ad and keep viewers engaged.

-Subtitles & Engagement Editing-

Subtitles are mandatory in every video.

Requirements:

• Subtitles must look similar to CapCut default subtitle style

• Subtitles must appear frequently throughout the video

• Subtitles should help emphasize important parts of the script



Subtitles should be placed between B-roll transitions.

The goal is to:

• Keep viewers engaged

• Prevent drop-off

• Increase watch time

• Improve conversion rate



-Video Structure-



Each video should include everything required for a high converting eCommerce ad:

• Strong hook in the first 3 seconds

• B-roll transitions throughout the video

• Voiceover narration

• Subtitles

• Background sound or music

• Clear pacing that keeps viewers watching

• Final call-to-action

The final result should feel like a professional
 ad creative designed to convert.



-Required Skills-

We are specifically looking for editors with eCommerce advertising experience.

You should have experience with:

• Editing
 / TikTok ads

• Creating UGC style product videos

• Understanding direct response marketing

• Creating high engagement hooks



Technical skills required:

• CapCut / Premiere Pro / After Effects or similar

• Experience with AI video tools

• AI B-roll creation

• Face swap tools

• Motion text and subtitles



-Trial Task (Important)-

To evaluate editing skills and attention to detail, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a small trial task.

Reference video:



Trial task instructions:

Create the first 25 seconds of the video based on the reference.

Requirements:

• Follow the structure and pacing of the reference video

• Create B-roll segments that include the toddler sock shoes



For each B-roll scene:

• Use AI tools to replace the face

• Use AI tools to change clothing

• Keep the persona similar to the one in the reference video (same type of parent / toddler situation)



Environment requirements:

• The surroundings should stay very similar to the reference video

• However, the environment must be visibly different so it does not look like the original source



Goal:

The final result should look very similar in concept and storytelling, but not identical to the reference video.



The goal of the video is to create a high-engagement eCommerce ad that keeps viewers watching and increases the chance they will purchase the product.

This short trial helps us evaluate:

• Editing quality

• AI B-roll creation ability

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow references while still creating original content



Bonus:

• Experience editing ads for eCommerce brands

title: Creative Strategist – Paid Social (D2C) | Full-Time Remote
description:
About ARDANT



Jewelry you never take off. 130,000+ customers across the US, UK, Australia, and Canada in under 1.5 years. Our team has scaled brands from launch to eight figures and beyond. See our work at 
.



The Role



We built this brand on the back of ad creative that works. This role owns that function.



You'll lead a creative pod of a video editor and graphic designer, responsible for the volume, quality, and speed of everything that goes out. You'll write the briefs, set the direction, analyze what's performing, and keep raising the bar on what winning looks like.



If you've been producing results at another brand but feel like your work isn't moving fast enough or you're ready for more ownership, this is worth your attention.



---



What You'll Own



1. Ad brief production. Write 20+ briefs per week across video and static formats. Clear, strategic, and executable.

2. Customer research. Develop and refine ad avatars based on real customer insight. Know who you're targeting before you brief a single frame.

3. Creative direction. Direct your pod to execute at a high standard. You know what good looks like and communicate it clearly.

4. Performance analysis. Review ad performance weekly. Understand what's working, what isn't, and develop sharper hypotheses each time.

5. Iteration. Produce effective variations of winning ads. Keep the pipeline moving.

6. Feedback Loop. Document learnings and feed them back into the next round of briefs.



---



What We're Looking For



Must-haves:

- 5+ years in marketing, currently or most recently working as a Creative Strategist producing winning ads for D2C brands.

- A strong portfolio of ad creative, video and static, with results to back it up.

- Proven experience directing video editors and graphic designers.

- Direct response copywriting skills. Hooks, headlines, and scripts that drive action.

- Deep understanding of Meta and Instagram ad formats and what performs.

- Research-driven approach to customer personas and audience targeting.

- Ability to diagnose underperforming ads and come back with stronger ideas.

- Strong communicator who can brief and collaborate at pace.



Bonus points, strong priority:

- Winning ads in North American, UK, or Australian markets for women's lifestyle or beauty brands.

- Problem-solution creative angles in fashion, beauty, or lifestyle categories.

- Experience inside a performance or growth marketing team.



---



What Success Looks Like



This role is KPI-driven. You'll be measured on three things:

- **Volume.** Hitting brief targets consistently each week.

- **Quality.** Winning ad hit rate across the pod's output.

- **Speed.** Time from brief to live creative.



---



Why Join ARDANT



We move fast. Briefs go live within days and you'll see the direct impact of your work in real time on a global audience.



You'll work with senior leaders who have taken brands from zero to eight figures and beyond. We're building something with serious long-term ambition and the creative function is central to how we get there. The team is sharp, the feedback is honest, and the standard is high because everyone holds themselves to it.



- Competitive salary with performance bonuses.

- Real ownership of a function that directly drives brand growth.

- Strong performers take on more as the brand scales.

- Fully remote. Flexible hours.



---



How to Apply



Send your CV and a portfolio of ad creatives you've produced for D2C brands. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



We're hiring fast. Strong applicants hear from us first.

title: AI Video Ad Editor – VSL & Performance Creative Specialist (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-scaling direct-to-consumer health & wellness brand based in Europe, serving customers across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Scandinavia. We run aggressive performance marketing campaigns on Meta 
 & Instagram) and are building one of the most efficient remote creative teams in Europe.

We move fast. We test constantly. And we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

This is NOT a traditional video editing job.

We're looking for an AI-powered Video Editor who specializes in high-converting VSLs and direct-response ad creatives. You won't just cut footage — you'll be building assets that turn cold viewers into paying customers and help scale a European DTC brand from the ground up.

You'll work directly with the creative strategist and performance marketer, producing multiple ad variations per week — all powered by AI workflows.



What You'll Be Creating



VSLs (Video Sales Letters): Short-form, 2–4 minute conversion-focused video ads built with AI-generated visuals, voiceovers, authority figures, and animations — this is your primary output

UGC-Style Ads: AI-created user-generated content that feels native and authentic to social feeds

Street Interview / Testimonial Ads: Realistic AI-generated "man on the street" style social proof videos

Cartoon / Animated Ads: Scroll-stopping AI-generated cartoon-style creatives

Hook Variations: Multiple opening hooks per VSL for systematic split testing





Key Responsibilities



Edit and produce conversion-focused VSLs optimized for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Transform raw briefs, scripts, testimonials, and product shots into high-performing video creatives

Produce multiple ad variations per week using AI editing workflows

Source high-quality UGC, B-roll, and sound effects from TikTok, YouTube, and stock platforms

Use AI tools (avatars, AI voiceovers, B-roll generation) to maximize creative output

Collaborate closely with the creative strategist to iterate quickly based on ad performance data

Stay current on video trends across Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts in the wellness and lifestyle space





What We're Looking For



2+ years of experience editing performance ads or VSLs for DTC/eCommerce brands

Deep, hands-on experience with AI video tools: Runway, Pika, Kling, HeyGen, Synthesia, VEO 3, Sora, or similar

Experience with AI voiceover tools: ElevenLabs, PlayHT, or similar

Proficiency in AI image generation: Midjourney, DALL-E, Flux, Leonardo, or similar

Strong skills in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or equivalent editing software

Proven understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology (hooks, pattern interrupts, CTAs)

Able to produce 10–15+ ad creatives per week using AI workflows

Capable of sourcing and curating UGC or short-form content independently

Organized, proactive communicator — able to manage multiple projects at once

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Reliable internet connection and own equipment





This Role Won't Suit You If You...



Focus only on aesthetics and not performance metrics

Have no experience editing Meta Ads VSLs

Struggle with fast feedback loops or tight turnaround times

Need constant step-by-step supervision

Are unavailable for full-time consistent work





What We Offer



Stable, long-term full-time position with a growing company

Work directly with the founder and creative strategist — no layers of bureaucracy

Real creative ownership: your edits directly impact business results

Performance bonuses based on winning ad creatives

Access to paid AI tool subscriptions

Freedom to experiment with cutting-edge tools and automation

A fast-paced team that values speed, creativity, and measurable impact





Ready to Apply?

We only review applications submitted through our Typeform. Please copy and paste this link into your browser (remove spaces):

form .typeform. com/to/ dO9pZYvu

Only candidates who complete the Typeform will be considered. It takes less than 8 minutes — we'll respond within 3–5 business days.

title: Social Media Engager
description:
**Company/Organization: **Digital Products Creators**



**Location:** Virtual Position



IN ORDER TO APPLY PLEASE SEND A VIDEO TELLING US YOUR EXPRIENCE AS A SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER AND WHY WE SHOULD HIRE YOU AND HOW WILL YOU BE AN ASSET TO OUR COMPANY. MUST BE 100% COMMITTED AND CANNOT HAVE SEVERAL FREELANCE POSITIONS.



YOU MUST HAVE EXPEREINCE AS A SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER. THERE WILL BE NO EXCEPTIONS....



THIS IS A LONG-TERM POSITION. YOU CANNOT HAVE MULTIPLE FREELANCE JOBS TO WORK FOR THIS COMPANY. YOU MUST BE COMMITTED AND FOCUSED. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ANY SOCIAL MEDIA EXPEREINCE OR IF YOU WORK FOR ANOTHER CLIENT



We are a dynamic and influential public figure seeking a dedicated and creative Social Media Manager to join our team. We're looking for a skilled individual to manage and grow our online presence across various social media platforms.



**Job Description: **



As our Social Media Manager, you'll play a pivotal role in shaping and executing the social media strategy for Digital Product Creators. You'll be responsible for curating engaging content, fostering meaningful connections with our audience, and maintaining the integrity and authenticity of our brand. You will be responsible for managing four
 Groups.



**Responsibilities:**



- Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with the Digital Product Creators Brand.

- Create original and captivating content (posts, stories, videos, etc.) that resonates with our audience while maintaining the figure's unique voice.

- Engage with our audience across social media channels, responding to comments, messages, and inquiries in a timely and authentic manner.

- Cultivate a strong community and foster meaningful interactions to enhance our brand's presence.

- Manage the figure's public image and uphold consistency in messaging, tone, and visual identity.

- Monitor social media trends, analyze performance metrics, and generate reports with actionable insights to optimize strategies.

- Identify and leverage strategic partnerships and collaborations to expand our reach and influence.

- Actively comment on posts and engage with followers.

- Respond to direct messages promptly and professionally.

- Foster a sense of community and connection online.

- Collaborate with the team to create engaging content.



**Requirements:**



- 3 years of proven experience managing social media for public figures, celebrities, or influential personalities.

title: Operations Manager - 8-Figure Ecommerce Brand
description:
## About Us



We are a fast-growing DTC nutraceutical company focused on women's health supplements. We've scaled from $0 to over seven figures per month in under a year, and we're just getting started. We're building a world-class remote team and need an Operations Manager who can own the machine that keeps everything running.



## Why This Role Is Critical



Our founder's highest-leverage work is creative strategy and growth. Right now, too much of his time is spent on operational firefighting—managing people, chasing supply chain updates, processing payments, and keeping systems running. This role exists to take full ownership of day-to-day operations so the business can scale without the founder being a bottleneck.



## What You'll Own



### Systems & SOPs



- Build, document, and maintain SOPs for every role and process in Notion

- Ensure every role has a clear playbook so new hires can onboard without tribal knowledge

- Audit and improve existing processes—identify bottlenecks and fix them



### People Management & Accountability



- Manage all tea
mbers day-to-day—you are the primary point of contact for the team

- Track and enforce KPIs on a weekly basis using job scorecards

- Run weekly team standups and 1:1 check-ins

- Conduct monthly and quarterly performance reviews

- Handle underperformance conversations and performance improvement plans

- Process contractor and team payments



### Hiring & Onboarding



- Manage the hiring pipeline when roles open: post jobs, screen applicants, coordinate assessments, schedule interviews

- Build and execute structured onboarding plans for every new hire

- Maintain and update job descriptions and scorecards for all roles



### Supply Chain & Fulfillment



- Own inventory tracking, demand forecasting, and reorder management

- Manage freight logistics and coordinate shipments (China ? US warehouses)

- Manage 3PL relationships—monitor SLAs, resolve issues, optimize costs

- Prevent stockouts and overstock situations through proactive forecasting



### Cost Visibility



- Track recurring business expenses (tools, subscriptions, vendors) and flag anomalies

- Deliver a monthly OPEX summary—where money is going and what looks off



## Requirements



- 2+ years in an operations or project management role in e-commerce or DTC

- Advanced Notion user (required)—you build systems in it, not just use it

- Actively uses AI tools daily to automate work, build systems, and solve problems

- Experience managing remote teams across multiple time zones

- Experience with supply chain: inventory management, 3PL coordination, freight, and demand forecasting

- Comfortable reading basic financials: OPEX tracking, vendor costs, budget vs. actual

- Has experience with hiring processes



## Character Traits We're Looking For



- **Ownership mentality** — treats the business like their own, doesn't wait to be told

- **Systems thinker** — sees a messy process and instinctively documents and fixes it

- **Proactive communicator** — surfaces problems before they escalate, provides updates without being asked

- **Comfortable with hard conversations** — holds people accountable while keeping them motivated

- **Organized to the extreme** — nothing falls through the cracks

- **Resourceful** — figures things out before asking for help



## This Is NOT For You If:



- You need to be told what to do every day

- You think operations is just admin work

- You're not comfortable managing people and having difficult conversations

- You don't actively use AI tools in your daily workflow

- You've never worked in e-commerce or DTC

- You've never built systems or SOPs from scratch

- You can't work autonomously across time zones



## Compensation & Perks



- $50,000–$70,000/year base

- Paid annual leave: 14 calendar days

- Fully remote

- Paid sick days



### How to Apply



If this sounds like you, please fill out the form below and you will hear back from us soon!



[
](
)



SLD Ecommerce is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion.



We encourage all applications irrespective of gender, race, sexual orientation, religion, age, nationality, marital status, and disability. We believe that diversity is at the heart of innovation and we welcome passionate candidates from all backgrounds. Come join the family and see for yourself!

title: Merchandiser
description:
The Merchandiser is responsible for ensuring the availability, visibility, and appeal of products in assigned outlets. This includes implementing effective product displays, maintaining product hygiene, and executing merchandising standards to boost product off-take and consumer awareness.



Ensure complete and attractive display of products on shelves and mass displays in line with merchandising guidelines.

Maintain cleanliness and appeal of all displayed products.

Conduct regular inventory and submit timely reports including inventory and off-take summaries.

Replenish shelves and monitor stock levels to prevent stock-outs.

Install and maintain merchandising materials like posters and price tags.

Monitor and report on competitor activities and in-store promotions.

Follow FEFO for stock rotation and report expiring or damaged goods.

Support in-store promotions and maintain good relationships with outlet staff.

High school graduate or college level; preferably with related work experience.

Physically fit and willing to do fieldwork.

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented.

Good communication and interpersonal skills.

Able to follow merchandising standards and company policies.

title: Government Proposals & Business Development Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Business Development & Proposals Coordinator to support the growth of our strategic communications and consulting firm.



This role is ideal for someone with hands-on experience in government procurement, proposal coordination, and technical writing. You will help identify new contract opportunities, coordinate proposal development from start to finish, and support the writing, formatting, compliance, and submission of high-quality proposals.



You will play a key role in helping the company pursue contracts with government agencies, foundations, and large institutions. This position requires someone who is proactive, highly organized, an excellent writer, and comfortable managing complex deadlines across multiple workstreams and contributors.



Key Responsibilities

Opportunity Research

• Identify and research new business opportunities, including RFPs, RFQs, and grant opportunities

• Monitor government procurement portals, industry listservs, and opportunity databases

• Prepare clear summaries of opportunities, including scope, deadlines, requirements, and recommendations on whether to pursue



Proposal Coordination

• Manage the administrative and operational side of proposal development

• Prepare proposal outlines, development plans, and internal task assignments

• Track all deadlines, milestones, and submission requirements

• Create and manage proposal timelines in Asana

• Coordinate internal contributors to ensure deliverables are completed on time

• Communicate with issuing agencies regarding questions, clarifications, and submission logistics when needed



Proposal Development Support

• Help write and draft selected sections of proposals

• Support technical and narrative writing as part of the proposal development process

• Format documents and ensure compliance with submission requirements

• Coordinate signatures, forms, attachments, resumes, and required supporting documentation

• Manage final packaging and submission of proposal materials



Business Development Operations

• Maintain the company’s active pipeline of opportunities

• Develop and organize proposal content libraries, templates, and reusable materials

• Maintain formatted staff resumes, project descriptions, and case studies for proposal use

• Track proposal submissions, results, and follow-up actions



Administrative Compliance

• Maintain business certifications and licenses required for proposal eligibility

• Manage company registrations in procurement systems and vendor portals

• Maintain access credentials and compliance-related records needed for submissions



Required Skills and Qualifications

• Strong research and analytical skills

• Excellent written English

• Experience coordinating proposals or responding to RFPs

• Experience with government procurement processes and/or procurement portals

• Strong technical writing or proposal writing skills

• Exceptional organization and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple deadlines and moving parts at once

• Proficiency in Google Docs, Microsoft Word, and PDF formatting

• Experience using project management software, especially Asana

• Ability to read, interpret, and follow complex instructions and submission requirements



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting government proposals or grants

• Experience in consulting, communications, marketing, or professional services

• Familiarity with U.S. government procurement portals

• Experience writing proposal narratives or technical proposal sections

• Experience formatting resumes, proposals, and submission packages



Ideal Candidate

You are highly organized, dependable, and comfortable working in a deadline-driven environment. You have experience supporting or coordinating government proposal efforts, and you are confident in your ability to help write, organize, and manage complex submissions. You are able to balance research, writing, project coordination, and compliance details without letting anything fall through the cracks.



This role is best suited for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and understands the level of precision required in proposal and procurement work.

title: Job Recruitment: Local Chinese Translator in the Philippines (With Path to Regional Director)
description:
Job Recruitment: Local Chinese Translator in the Philippines (With Path to Regional Director)

I. Position

Local Chinese Translator in the Philippines (Full-time, long-term based in the Philippines, with promotion path to Regional Director)



II. Job Responsibilities

Undertake two-way translation between Chinese and Filipino for business communication, document drafting, meeting interpretation, daily liaison, and other scenarios, ensuring zero error in information delivery. Only Filipino native citizens will be considered; Chinese citizens are not accepted.

Fully support the leadership of the China Head Office in handling all local affairs in the Philippines, including but not limited to local business coordination, client relationship management, issue resolution, emergency response, and assistance with local policies and compliance matters.

Provide language support and on-the-ground assistance during the Head Office leadership’s business trips and work in the Philippines to ensure efficient execution of all tasks.

Strictly abide by the confidentiality agreement, properly manage all company, client, and internal information accessed during work, and prohibit disclosure.

Proactively learn about the company’s business, products, and the local Philippine market, assist in developing local cooperation channels, and support the company’s business growth in the Philippines.



III. Requirements

Nationality & Status: Must be a Filipino citizen with no Chinese citizenship background, long-term and stable resident in the Philippines, with valid legal working/residence status in the Philippines (supporting documents required).

Language Proficiency: Extremely fluent in Chinese (both spoken and written), with zero barriers in professional terminology and business scenarios; proficient in two-way translation and familiar with Sino?Philippine business culture.

Work Experience: At least 1 year of relevant Chinese translation experience; preference for candidates with business translation or overseas business trip support experience; familiarity with local Philippine business environment and regulations is a plus; experience in channel development or team management is highly desirable.

Competencies: Strong communication, coordination, emergency response, execution, and responsibility; detail?oriented, able to work independently with planning and organizational awareness.

Time & Travel: Able to adapt to long-term business trips within the Philippines and to China; flexible to support the Head Office leadership’s schedule; one day off on Sunday; available to respond to work as needed (no mandatory overtime).

Basic Conditions: Age 25–50, gender-neutral, physically healthy, able to adapt to the local Philippine climate and work rhythm, with long-term stable employment intention.



IV. Salary & Benefits

Salary: Monthly salary USD 1,000–1,500, negotiable based on language proficiency, work experience, and comprehensive quality; paid monthly in full and on time with no delays.

Work Mode: Based locally in the Philippines (work location negotiable, priority to Metro Manila and surrounding key areas); hybrid remote and on-site work; no frequent travel to China required.

Career Development: Clear promotion path provided. Outstanding performers with strong capabilities may be promoted to Regional Director for the Philippines after several years, fully responsible for overall business, team management, and channel development in the Philippines, with exclusive salary, benefits, and development resources for the Regional Director role.

Other Benefits: Annual performance bonus based on work performance; regular job training and onboarding support to enhance professional capabilities.



V. How to Apply

Required Documents: Resume (including Philippine ID, proof of residence, translation work cases, and detailed experience), Chinese language proficiency proof (e.g., certificate, translation samples), local Philippine contact number and
.

Application
: [Please fill in company recruitment
]

 Subject: Application for Chinese Translator in the Philippines – Full Name – Philippine ID Number



VI. Additional Notes

Interview: Online interview (mainly in Chinese, focusing on Chinese fluency, translation accuracy, and problem-solving ability); offline interview in Metro Manila may be arranged as needed.

Onboarding: Formal labor contract signed upon passing the interview, clarifying rights, obligations, salary details, and promotion mechanism; onboarding training provided (company business, workflow, job responsibilities, etc.).

Position Statement: This is a long-term stable position. The company attaches great importance to business development in the Philippines and is committed to providing a long-term career platform for outstanding employees. Promotion to Regional Director is performance- and capability-based with no additional barriers.

title: Systems Administrator & IT Operations Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based strategic communications and marketing agency serving clients in public health, government, education, and social impact sectors. Our work involves complex projects, multiple systems, and high standards for data security and operational reliability.



We are hiring a Systems & IT Operations Manager to take ownership of our internal technology environment. This includes managing business systems and software, user access, security, equipment, website updates, and day-to-day technical support for a remote team.



This is not a basic IT support role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, maintain strong systems and security practices, solve technical problems, and help improve operational efficiency as the company grows.



This role also includes occasional support with data entry, data organization, and data-related tasks for active client projects.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Systems Administration

Manage company systems, software, accounts, and configurations across tools such as:

• Google Workspace / Google Admin

• Asana

• Apple

• Slack

• Zoom

• Microsoft 365 / Microsoft Teams

• Adobe

• Gusto

• Stripe

• Squarespace

• GoDaddy

• Mailchimp

• Whova

• IBM SPSS

• Google Drive and cloud storage platforms

• Other tools used by the agency



This includes:

• Creating and managing user accounts

• Assigning and maintaining access permissions

• Configuring systems and keeping them organized

• Monitoring updates, settings, and new features



Identity & Access Management

• Maintain secure login and authentication processes

• Manage user roles and access permissions

• Conduct regular access reviews and audits

• Maintain SSO where applicable

• Enforce password security policies and tools



Security & Data Protection

• Maintain strong cybersecurity practices across company systems

• Enforce MFA across platforms

• Monitor security alerts and suspicious activity

• Help protect sensitive company and client information

• Support response and resolution if security issues arise



Backup & Disaster Recovery

• Maintain backup procedures for company data

• Ensure key data is recoverable

• Periodically test restoration procedures

• Keep disaster recovery documentation updated



Equipment & Device Management

• Maintain inventory of company laptops and technology equipment

• Track warranties, updates, and device records

• Order equipment for new hires as needed

• Manage technical setup for onboarding and offboarding

• Help remote employees troubleshoot device issues



Technical Support

• Troubleshoot technical problems for employees

• Assist staff with system setup and usage

• Provide guidance on best practices

• Create and maintain internal how-to guides and documentation



Vendor & License Management

• Track software subscriptions, licenses, and seat usage

• Manage renewals and vendor relationships

• Monitor software costs and recommend cost-saving opportunities

• Negotiate pricing when appropriate



Workflow Optimization & Automation

• Identify ways to improve internal workflows

• Recommend and implement integrations or automations where useful

• Help maintain efficient systems architecture as the company grows



Data & Research Support

Support internal research and analytics projects by:

• Assisting with survey administration and online data collection

• Organizing incoming data

• Performing data entry and data cleaning when needed

• Supporting research teams with tools such as SPSS or survey platforms



File & Digital Systems Organization

• Maintain a clear and well-organized file system

• Ensure files are accessible, properly labeled, and easy to locate

• Manage permissions across shared drives and folders

• Periodically review and improve file structure and organization



Documentation & Training

• Document systems, workflows, and internal processes

• Stay informed about better tools and current best practices

• Conduct occasional staff training on systems and usage



Website Management (Squarespace)

• Maintain and update the company website in Squarespace

• Publish pages, blog posts, team updates, and announcements

• Make basic layout and site configuration updates

• Ensure forms, integrations, and website functions are working properly

• Coordinate updates to images, copy, and page structure

• Monitor website performance and identify improvement opportunities

• Maintain organized backups of website content and assets

• Perform routine maintenance to keep the website secure and updated



Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, IT, or a related field

• 5+ years of experience managing SaaS systems and cloud-based tools

• Strong Google Workspace / Google Admin experience

• Experience managing multiple SaaS platforms in a business environment

• Experience with user access management and permissions

• Strong understanding of cybersecurity best practices

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

• Strong written and spoken English

• Experience supporting remote teams



Nice to Have

• Experience managing systems for an agency or service-based business

• Experience with Asana administration

• Experience with data tools such as SPSS, surveys, or analytics systems

• Experience building automations or system integrations

• Experience supporting distributed or international teams



Key Skills We’re Looking For

• SaaS systems administration and cloud platform management

• IT security, access control, and identity management

• Technical troubleshooting and remote team support



Work Structure

• Remote

• Philippines-based applicants only

• Full-time, long-term role

• Must overlap at least 4 hours daily with U.S. Pacific Time

• Stable internet connection required



Who This Role Is Best For

You are organized, dependable, and comfortable owning systems across a growing company. You are not just reactive when something breaks — you think ahead, improve processes, maintain security, and keep technology running smoothly for the team.



You are comfortable managing multiple platforms, supporting users, documenting systems, and solving technical problems while maintaining a strong eye for security, structure, and efficiency.
